name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: as of 7pm:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe_ym~)

I have never come to you with a more important ask.

\-- Republicans need to flip just**FIVE** seats of my Democrats to take back the House.
\-- Right now, we're **DEADLOCKED** in the polls -- 42% to 42%.
\-- But as of 7pm, Republicans have launched a vicious **$7.5 MILLION** attack ad targeting seven of my most vulnerable Democrats.

**The situation is dire, and if we 're going to protect my House Democrats and defeat House Republicans, we need to invest NOW.**

**[So I'm calling for 100 donors to step up and chip in a recurring monthly $3 in the next five hours to join the ranks of my Majority Makers and help PROTECT our critical House Majority from falling into Republican hands. Can I count on your recurring monthly $3 in this absolutely dire moment? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)**

Let me explain:

**Majority Makers are grassroots Democrats who give recurring monthly contributions of $3, $10, or even $25, because they know that to win in 2022, we need to start investing in our House Democrats NOW. There 's simply not a second to lose. **

And as a thank you, Majority Makers will receive exclusive updates about the state of our races and opportunities to hear directly from me and other Democratic leaders.

**[Please: Can I count on you to step up and chip in a recurring monthly gift of $3 -- or whatever you can spare -- to become a Majority Maker today?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)**
| [](https://links.e.dccc.)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
MAJORITY MAKER STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---

I've never needed Democrats to step up more forcefully than I do at this moment.

We can't afford to lose a single Democratic seat.

**But if we reach my critical midnight goal, we could show Trump, McCarthy, and all their special interest donors that we will NEVER let them take the House from us.**

**[Can I count on you to become a Majority Maker and rush an urgent recurring monthly $3 before midnight?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

| [**Donate $1 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6_)
---
| [**Donate $5 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Donate $10 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Donate $15 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cg_)
---
| [**Donate $20 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

Nancy

_P.S. One-time gifts are a vital contribution in the fight to defend my House Democrats. If you 'd prefer to make a one-time donation instead, __**[I'd be so grateful if you could chip in here.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)**___

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. |
---
Fellow American,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cb05d58fd3c640ebab7d22ad25b5a216&_e=e7oVU1hfwLo7z22uA826HwE3WqYIjxFeGOVK5iSG65kp9Esef1ApKexWOKDUTz3IGAdt24oblCfCqCtZroq_M9Fi5IoKKUY8MowoCcm_QF5L7taMOFpMnzUAMsbTI9rI3k3f_Qz58dcdevLjXqYRg4AIMNxOWCvQGEOvYPV93vPPt_LsekzaRRsaG8Xh-vFrBm71fMphpFT-s66Tl4XHO2SlqXvpdQ74s5y2-hHtQboYh-fi9UyAZ-dpzC8O3ndleae3RhOSH7tsoQeU0NprHIS6uwcQkAoeiaQqcm0HHc2gJNBshKdPnJUR0Tq8vHxjqfOZ599Z-2TapP7NKvRNB_oiWXn1Ib9N41J4kG5ScpT2q1jDKvLRe-acsk_Up8cyaSJ4NTgQYJGr_liEg4duLesogj7rxKMrb-o6E_9AOOcjPn9KnkJ2EgsPZsdUCrRneiUcrOOY-2-iLUkma7PIew3qlGi7ROEtQl3D9P_ByqI%3D)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

And, of course, it all takes money to operate. **[So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day, and I hope you'll help me reach my goal by making an immediate gift of whatever you can.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cb05d58fd3c640ebab7d22ad25b5a216&_e=e7oVU1hfwLo7z22uA826HwE3WqYIjxFeGOVK5iSG65kp9Esef1ApKexWOKDUTz3IGAdt24oblCfCqCtZroq_M9Fi5IoKKUY8MowoCcm_QF5L7taMOFpMnzUAMsbTI9rI3k3f_Qz58dcdevLjXqYRg4AIMNxOWCvQGEOvYPV93vPPt_LsekzaRRsaG8Xh-vFrBm71fMphpFT-s66Tl4XHO2SlqXvpdQ74s5y2-hHtQboYh-fi9UyAZ-dpzC8O3ndleae3RhOSH7tsoQeU0NprHB3T0Fwygy98piTjU84oVsYukl3GXjbfIcP7ebAysPrfo80tTCG94_JIpcljnUyZHxF2cQYx0a9SNHLDgu-qz6ZbzvTLAwC-r_nW-xPju57LVsrhmpx8MUmjHbmVAPHniNEpht1zLuoX2n3WixOnYKTeDOWHx9MO7vwTAUHVoP_6W4xi8NuDplcNzIWotjAy8ke0TRMn4UXGCo63nxhDdVY%3D)**

clean_body: The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. | Fellow American, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. Respectfully, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and Democrat establishment know that they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning Georgia. I am counting on you, Fellow American, to help us win back the Senate. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Eli Bremer
subject: I call this REAL masculinity
body:
Visit our website [https://eliforsenate.com/] I will not bow to the WOKE. Join me in standing up for what’s RIGHT! [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=I+call+this+REAL+masculinity]

During a recent speech I spoke of my parents move from DC to Colorado because they wanted to raise their boys to be western men and not DC sissies. In response, the Colorado Democratic Party blasted me, saying I was oozing toxic masculinity.

My response? Guilty as charged.

My parents home schooled my brothers and me to make sure we got great academic and character training. I learned at home and in church that you treat women with respect. So if that’s toxic masculinity, count me in.

I was an Officer in the Air Force for 14 years; an Olympian in 2008 where I stood for the anthem every single time. So if serving in the military and standing for the anthem is toxic masculinity, again, count me in.

While Michael Bennet was silent, I worked with Republicans and Democrats to pass legislative reforms to protect women from predators in sports. So maybe Democrats call that toxic masculinity, but I call it doing the right thing.

As your next Senator, I’ll fight for Colorado and America. I’ll stand for what’s right.

If you are ready to fight to take back our state and our nation, please join my team. Donate $5 or $10 today [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=I+call+this+REAL+masculinity]

Veteran, Olympian, Lifelong Republican, Fighter for Colorado,

Eli Bremer

name: Lauren Daugherty
subject: College campuses FORCING vaccines on people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Americans for Liberty
body:
College campuses aren’t just discriminating against unvaccinated young people. They are FORCING vaccines on students in order
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z79tpi6irlk5g4eovtrule8q5e3lrguj15cd4fpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdg62ob4c3h2bs)

Friend,

College campuses aren't just discriminating against unvaccinated young people. They are FORCING vaccines on students in order to be eligible for enrollment.

Rutgers University even barred a student from attending ONLINE classes because he chose not to receive the vaccine...

You and I have an opportunity to fight back against vaccine mandates, vaccine passports, and mask requirements. Young Americans for Liberty is launching our Students Rights Campaign (SRC) to defeat vaccine mandates on college campuses.

[**Help us DEFEAT vaccine mandates on college campuses across the country by donating to Young Americans for Liberty with a gift of $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even more!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3k7aq1roqh84r12ued1ot7u5dqbr9ofbbsba6b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdg62ob4c3h2bs)

My name is Lauren Daugherty and I'm the CEO of Young Americans for Liberty.

Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics. Our mission is to identify, educate, train, and mobilize students on college campuses to **Make Liberty Win. **

Our formula is creating REAL results: recruit young people to the ideas of liberty, train them on how to be highly effective, and then connect them with opportunities to help turn our country around.

Here are some of our recent accomplishments:
* Electing 179 liberty candidates to state legislatures across the country
* Helping pass School Choice legislation in Kentucky and Missouri
* Helping pass Constitutional Carry in Texas
* Abolishing 76 unconstitutional "free speech codes" on college campuses
* Recruiting TENS of THOUSANDS of students to the cause of liberty

Our next mission is to defeat Joe Biden's vaccine mandates and win battles on college campuses via our Students Rights Campaign (SRC).

The SRC will focus on ending vaccine mandates, repealing gun-free zones on campuses, eliminating free-speech codes, and empowering students to fight for liberty on campus.

You and I must build a new generation of pro-liberty advocates who can fight and save our country from socialists activists and cancel culture.

Please take action today -- Support Young Americans for Liberty and help us defeat vaccine mandates by making a donation:

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $1,776 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zei9qeh22e66c3sn6oab2l3cbr9ork9tu4tht7s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdg62ob4c3h2bs)

It's not enough to oppose vaccine mandates and socialism... we must fight back.

I am counting on your help to empower our student activists to defeat vaccine mandates, socialism, and big government.

Thank you for your generous support!

Lauren Daugherty
CEO
Young Americans for Liberty

| | |
---
| What I Believe:
---
1. I believe in parental choice.
2. I believe categorizing vociferous dissent as "[domestic terrorism](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001of8sCSRHyEegdnrWPSXZ5mhDATah8oS4XeHYdnMvnOqzdfkSBy7Orl_VPh7KULXubrBnJp5urBMvVjgkCJa08tQlm9u0WA-Z9qgxjYb0MGokn3nXb52j3WqwrEpAjCmUMBfX2a6Iu4nRQs3m8sfrArXyg7QLdDUhms47zBl158j12ZQvQSaNJwllH4DNX8owWN26LaGZNxzynVgv97rRrb2d_pZQolF63piUfoDOs7Nzqebkjxb5iOkOEvOnjbN9ToJPPeb3HGZogkTId77et98Gfq1r_CYfxKtxegvkKjoNLLaHLWl11w==&c=69tJrHMq4NUIUWTWPMSwTbMhqbHe6RJfsRS7029Sqza_RTsaqGM6jw==&ch=fjKh8VUNEy-TjZaI1HiYFKh2HT-TcD6bViCFC10k-QchWouP3cPSsQ==)" is wrong and removes legitimate parental concerns from the realm of civic debate.
3. I believe parents have the right to see all books and materials used in classes taken by their children.
4. I believe it should be easy to vote and hard to cheat.
5. I support photo ID requirements and believe all mail-in ballots should be received by Election Day.
6. I believe in America's sovereignty and that our borders must be secured.
7. I believe the more than [10,000](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001of8sCSRHyEegdnrWPSXZ5mhDATah8oS4XeHYdnMvnOqzdfkSBy7Orl_VPh7KULXusJCpaxpb4Vux3lUPuONb4NqovWa4OlKvNO90P2z6JgCBWlUnAFH-fu6w7HKOT9Oeh3qKzex-FAWKH3raPfEudu7yjDZcdASMnQ1OhG6cKjJwmK6zNTGAryH0y2jJvAgv9YyIhP8n7iJY4jgob8vLARIeB5rbfDDr88BuuNDfBuQ5d08UErHigyiIc7JvE7IJie_nAjjrpP8=&c=69tJrHMq4NUIUWTWPMSwTbMhqbHe6RJfsRS7029Sqza_RTsaqGM6jw==&ch=fjKh8VUNEy-TjZaI1HiYFKh2HT-TcD6bViCFC10k-QchWouP3cPSsQ==) pounds of fentanyl seized at our porous Southern borders during 2021 is a dangerous problem.
8. I believe in medical freedom.
9. I believe central to medical freedom is physical autonomy.
10. I believe we can do better than this Administration.

---
|
---

---
| "Our country is sitting on a knife's edge right now. This thing could really go either way. Democrats are engaged in a street fight. They have no intentions of allowing the pendulum to naturally swing our direction just because it's a midterm election and everything Biden touches fails. They have shown they will do anything to stay in control."

name: Andy Biggs, Chairman
subject: Biden’s 5 Lane Highway into Socialism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483373:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "Nancy + Biden") Peter, Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Demented Left are working furiously to destroy our country, and I'm doing everything in my power to stop them. As the Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus, I have one goal in mind: **_Save_ _America_**. Every day Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi tighten their stranglehold on Washington is a day our freedom slips further out of reach. The socialist Biden-Pelosi Agenda will force trillions in debt onto the backs of hardworking patriots like you and me. They're shredding our Constitution and trampling our rights at a breakneck pace, and we must stop them. **We 're running out of time to stop them, and _that 's why I'm reaching out to you._** **[If you believe it's time to save America from the Radical Left in Congress and slam the brakes on their failed socialist agenda, stand with me by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 toward my campaign today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483374:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "If
you believe it’s time to save America from the Radical Left in Congress and slam the brakes on their failed socialist agenda, stand with me by
making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 toward my campaign today.")** I'm leading the charge against the radical threats to our liberty and security Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are forcing on the American people. It's never been more imperative that we do whatever it takes to fight back. **Will we embrace the rapid slide toward socialism, or will a new generation of patriots rise up to save America?_The stakes couldn 't be higher._** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483373:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "Camp")Joe Biden and Kamala Harris created the inhuman border crisis with Mexico. As a conservative leader in a border state, I'm working to force a vote on legislation that would secure our border and stop the flood of illegal aliens streaming across our border. **The REMAIN in Mexico Act would continue President Trump 's America First immigration policies and prevent human trafficking from dangerous cartels or disease from entering our communities. We must pass this bill!** **[If you believe America is worth fighting for- America is worth saving - then I ask you to make your generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 right away. With your support, I will fight tooth and nail to save America.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483375:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "If you believe America is worth fighting for – America is
worth saving – then I ask you to make your generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 right away. With your support, I will fight tooth
and nail to save America.")** Joe Biden doesn't just want to wreck our country with an uncontrollable flow of illegal aliens across our border - he's also trying to ruin our economy by paving a five-lane highway to socialism straight into America's heartland with his multi-trillion-dollar spending agenda! I am fighting every day in Congress to slam the brakes on their reckless agenda! And most recently, I filed the **Freedom From Mandates Act** to slam the brakes on Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate. Joe Biden's continued attempts to trample on the rights and liberties of Americans must not be tolerated - and this mandate is just another example of using fear and division to pit Americans against each other and maintain his control. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are leading the left-wing assault on our American values - Defund the Police, Critical Race Theory, and radical social policies that expose our children to their dangerous progressive dogma. **_I believe America is great because we defend law enforcement, oppose activist propaganda, and raise our children to love our country and their fellow man_.** This nation is too great to let Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Radical Left destroy it. **[I will keep fighting to save America, and I hope and pray you will join me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483373:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "I will keep fighting to save America, and I hope and pray you
will join me.")** Save America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483373:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "Andy Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
Chairman, House Freedom Caucus P.S. The choice should be as clear to you as it is to me. In a matter of months, AOC's vision for America will be a reality, or you can stand with me and ensure the vision of our Founding Fathers is protected for another generation. **[So, if you want to perpetuate freedom for another generation, then chip in $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY and send me to Congress to Save America!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483376:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "So, if you want to perpetuate freedom for another generation,
then chip in $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY and send me to Congress to Save America!")** Thank you. | | [Save America! - Donate Here](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58483373:Jar24I2Nn:m:1:3103520637:073DD3F45FE330FB49D01537650B38BC:r "Save America! - Donate Here")

subject: Thank you Peter
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
Peter,
Thank you Peter — because of you and our grassroots donors we were able to make September one of our most successful fundraising months yet. Your support means the world to us and it's what keeps us going in the fight to turn Tennessee blue.

subject: Only 27% (Iowa's Senate seat)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
This is our single greatest opportunity to flip Iowa blue and make sure Democrats maintain Senate control:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby, and I want to talk to you briefly about why our race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa is so important. You see, with Senate control split 50-50, every single Senate seat matters immensely – and as of this moment, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **Polling shows that only 27% of voters want to reelect him. I need your help to take advantage of this momentum.**
**[**If we win in Iowa, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep our Senate majority. So ahead of my next fundraising deadline at midnight, will you make a donation of $5 or more now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37177213/310301693/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk299-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQ2ZmYyNy02ZjI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apzh8GhDfAR-WT9q7n8Z5J8QRY4zgEE6tQnon_3ocr4=)**
I have every intention of doing what it takes to compete against Sen. Grassley and win this race. I made history in 2018 as the youngest woman to flip a congressional district from red to blue. That’s why Fox News and the Senate GOP campaign arm are already attacking me – because they know I can win.

**But Mitch McConnell’s allies have tens of millions of dollars in their campaign war chests. National Republicans are going to do everything within their power to protect Sen. Grassley, keep Iowa red and take back control of the Senate. We cannot let that happen. That's why I'm counting on the grassroots support of people like you – donating $10, $20, $50 at a time – to help me win this.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans saying it's time for Sen. Grassley to go, this is our single greatest opportunity to flip Iowa blue and make sure Democrats maintain Senate control:[So please, can you rush a donation of $5 or more to help me defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37177225/310301702/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk299-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQ2ZmYyNy02ZjI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apzh8GhDfAR-WT9q7n8Z5J8QRY4zgEE6tQnon_3ocr4=)**
With gratitude,
Abby

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqr2js9uvdm5mh5kdvos5rd300pb9a3gbh5dinpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdi68or1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t9jc3i64p1k6mqjao3i65gmfdbl65h76p3m65qbadj2clom7d9h6lgrepr0scrjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb6phh6ipm1ptiehj3ao5ic8r749fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkju29refkt19f76cm44rnq9pcu848rbsgkjb320_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdi68or1c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4fhr2ducvisgdb8ubjjs1omcb497m9i9jvomako_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdi68or1c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc33iknmcb8rmpd70c5ob6t5lj2bquinp0kksdg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdi68or1c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I have an important favor to ask - Gov. DeSantis is vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We need to do everything we can to defeat him. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37180929/310315374/-1399758842?refcode=20211007_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY3MTkxNy03MzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBOhN0Rr3ht-Uc7ixcKhtaMpen_IbMErXHfxhDrVk_Q=)
---

Folks, I have an important favor to ask you:

If you can, I need you to pitch in to my campaign to help defeat Governor DeSantis. And if you’ll give me just a minute, I’ll explain why your donation right now is so important.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37180930/310315375/-1399758842?refcode=20211007_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY3MTkxNy03MzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBOhN0Rr3ht-Uc7ixcKhtaMpen_IbMErXHfxhDrVk_Q=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37180931/310315376/-1399758842?refcode=20211007_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY3MTkxNy03MzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBOhN0Rr3ht-Uc7ixcKhtaMpen_IbMErXHfxhDrVk_Q=)
The scary truth is that **I’m worried about Florida’s future** if we allow Governor DeSantis another term. If we don’t defeat him now, he’s going to continue playing politics with our health, our voting rights, our reproductive freedoms, and more.

The good news is **Governor DeSantis is vulnerable** : Recent polls show his approval ratings dropping, and even better, they show me within the margin of error — or flat-out beating him.

But we can’t get complacent. Governor DeSantis has **an army of extreme right-wing billionaires** ready to spend and do whatever it takes to secure his re-election. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fight back.

**So, please don’t wait. Pitch in now to help us keep building our momentum so we can defeat Governor DeSantis and build a Florida for all:**

clean_body: We need to do everything we can to defeat him. | | | | = Folks, I have an important favor to ask you: If you can, I need you to pitch in to my campaign to help defeat Governor DeSantis. And if you’ll give me just a minute, I’ll explain why your donation right now is so important. = = The scary truth is that I’m worried about Florida’s future if we allow Governor DeSantis another term. If we don’t defeat him now, he’s going to continue playing politics with our health, our voting rights, our reproductive freedoms, and more. The good news is Governor DeSantis is vulnerable : Recent polls show his approval ratings dropping, and even better, they show me within the margin of error — or flat-out beating him. But we can’t get complacent. Governor DeSantis has an army of extreme right-wing billionaires ready to spend and do whatever it takes to secure his re-election. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fight back. So, please don’t wait. name: Catalina Lauf
subject: this is exactly why we hate Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58484701:6JVT0I2NU:m:1:3253819041:84D417D665EECABA8D7184145DD74455:r) | |
---
Peter, our members of Congress are a complete embarrassment.

**For them, everything is a photo-op. **

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58484701:6JVT0I2NU:m:1:3253819041:84D417D665EECABA8D7184145DD74455:r)

Just look at AOC committing the greatest act of hypocrisy by attending the mega-expensive Met Gala in a dress that costs thousands, with a message that says "tax the rich".

_Politicians like AOC will do anything for the photo, the fundraising opportunity, the retweets._

But they don't do ANYTHING for the people.
And AOC is not the only drama queen seeking attention while she fails to serve her voters.

_Adam Kinzinger is doing the exact same thing._

When he's not literally crying on the House floor, he's on fake news trashing his constituency, lying about President Trump, or attacking Tucker Carlson. All for his 15 minutes of fame.

I don't know about you, Peter, but I've had enough of these wannabe celebrities. America deserves real leadership.

**That's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this sad little spotlight-seeker out of office.**
[**JOIN ME NOW: DEFEAT KINZINGER >> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58484701:6JVT0I2NU:m:1:3253819041:84D417D665EECABA8D7184145DD74455:r)
Peter, my name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm ACTUALLY a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a damn clue.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. Total Trump Derangement Syndrome.
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission. _
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are all doing dirty work for Democrats every step of the way.

**After years of this performance, it's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**

That's why I want to replace him. _And I'm going to need your help to do it. _
[**HELP ME KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58484701:6JVT0I2NU:m:1:3253819041:84D417D665EECABA8D7184145DD74455:r)
**Despite my opponent's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'll actually fight this radical agenda and defend our Constitution.

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed cabal of Never Trump elites in 2022 - and I'll be their target.

**If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.**

_We can't let these c-list celebrity politicians continue to destroy our nation._

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America, and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I'll represent our American values in D.C., not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.
[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58484701:6JVT0I2NU:m:1:3253819041:84D417D665EECABA8D7184145DD74455:r)
Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58484701:6JVT0I2NU:m:1:3253819041:84D417D665EECABA8D7184145DD74455:r)

Catalina Lauf
---
---
| |
---

_Wow_ , Peter. 94.7% of our subscribers approve of President Biden’s job in office. A common comment among those who approve is that he “cares about the American people” and is “fighting for all of us.”
If we want Biden to keep pushing forward with his agenda to build back better and help the U.S. recover from the pandemic, then we need to keep our Democratic House and Senate majorities.

Friends,
On behalf of Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization (Be The Solution), we would like to thank everyone for their enthusiasm and support. The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference is back and only one week away! This year, we will host both a virtual and tele-townhall event on Thursday, October 14th from 10am - 1:30pm for our seniors to ensure that they are able to thrive in this season in their lives.
We will host inspirational speakers and informative classes. Due to pandemic safety considerations, we will NOT host an in person event this year, but will supply the first 250 seniors to register with lunch, a t-shirt and more! Registration is still open so please do not miss your chance to virtually attend this one-stop-shop for seniors!

REGISTER TODAY for The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference

For a year, the COVID-19 pandemic prevented Arizona students from gathering in their classrooms. Though our children have now returned to in-person learning, **yesterday's shooting at a Texas high school was a painful reminder of the risks they still face.**

August 2021 marked the highest number of gun incidents recorded on school campuses — and there's no indication that will go down.

We _must_ act to stop gun violence in our schools.

As a member of the Arizona House of Representatives, I have fought nonstop for **common-sense gun control measures**. I pledge to keep up the fight as Arizona's Attorney General, and I challenge my fellow candidates on both sides of the aisle to do the same. We can't play politics with the safety of our children.

clean_body: [tied race] | | | | | | BREAKING NEWS: “New poll shows virtual ties in races for Virginia governor, attorney general” “What we would really expect in a normal year ... is that McAuliffe should cruise to a comfortable victory. But that’s not what we’re seeing in the polls,” said 8News political analyst Rich Meagher. Can you chip in right now to help us break the tie? | = This is urgent, Derek. A new poll from Emerson shows Terry only up by a single point. At this point in the race, a poll as close as this — especially one from a top-rated FiveThirtyEight pollster — is a serious warning sign. Look, Terry has a serious vision for Virginia that will lift up working families and small businesses. He wants to defend and expand voting rights and reproductive rights, and he wants to keep Virginia moving forward. His Trump-endorsed opponent is a right-wing culture warrior with plans to roll back progress and enact Donald Trump’s agenda in Virginia. That’s why it’s so shocking that this race is tied right now, Derek!And what’s even more shocking is that not enough grassroots supporters are stepping up to help out. = | | = = | = = | | = = | = = | | = = | = = Thank you, Terry for VA ****= Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. | Governor Eric Greitens: Joe Biden Is the Largest Human and Child Trafficker in The World
---
| CIUDAD ACUÑA, MEXICO - Appearing on Steve Bannon's War Room from Ciudad Acuña, Mexico, former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens [discussed the horrific human conditions](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ZaVDH6kXco6QDY0Wc2aBQo98O007B3hZqVFc0BXAWx_T0EMEzfzb61FtniQPCutzI279H4_uXPs4JCMxEA-5VZ5QG10abDtu-oy9MfNv6Mpq8KcPdqkN227LC7UMJMmTSZJh-CTEPBn_F1zTOmgXHofNQEirQft4n-PfTf8UgcXFHHnKLyk59ix39-Va6peYGrJcNLpwLeTxrP5yHNidtvGFletvR36&c=sj4Q_S-vGkKeuziOfok5cJWtGneAxSlRIfPPjwd3olfUTaqoS8ykhw==&ch=qlsVf1xYivdx0frXA8kRabhzJRpRxxywFq5OBpZK44yVjZ0TrkEzsg==) at the southern border and the disastrous policies of Joe Biden that has now turned the border into an international transit point. Make no mistake: Joe Biden is the world's largest child and human trafficker in the world. Governor Greitens stated, "Joe Biden is the largest child trafficker in the world... not only has Joe Biden made impossible for law enforcement to do their job, made impossible for us to secure the border. What's also happened is that kids are being sold to families, to people, to present themselves as a family. They walk across the border and then those children are sent back across the border and used again. We're talking with a Border Patrol agent who came across one kid who'd been trafficked 17 times across the border. Joe Biden is the largest human trafficker in the world, right now... Joe Biden has turned our border over to Mexican drug gangs and cartels. This is now an international transit point." Watch Governor Greitens' report [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ZaVDH6kXco6QDY0Wc2aBQo98O007B3hZqVFc0BXAWx_T0EMEzfzb61FtniQPCutzI279H4_uXPs4JCMxEA-5VZ5QG10abDtu-oy9MfNv6Mpq8KcPdqkN227LC7UMJMmTSZJh-CTEPBn_F1zTOmgXHofNQEirQft4n-PfTf8UgcXFHHnKLyk59ix39-Va6peYGrJcNLpwLeTxrP5yHNidtvGFletvR36&c=sj4Q_S-vGkKeuziOfok5cJWtGneAxSlRIfPPjwd3olfUTaqoS8ykhw==&ch=qlsVf1xYivdx0frXA8kRabhzJRpRxxywFq5OBpZK44yVjZ0TrkEzsg==) and [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010ZaVDH6kXco6QDY0Wc2aBQo98O007B3hZqVFc0BXAWx_T0EMEzfzb61FtniQPCut-5UJy5GP0cIE_l8lPmuoEmIHsQq17InKiu2yS9pHnMEphQIiqujpqKllAZ692PvK6fw3V-JVwlLa8JQoPhyuwR7KhLXVl2Pl8lmIpqTmt67ZX4VGrsx4ViV5ehS4ecw-6xiemZATjwnYR0YtD1AMlFNTjaxq2HWT4mkQcHGiaLw4OmlIhnoLi-ENbDGwcbxp&c=sj4Q_S-vGkKeuziOfok5cJWtGneAxSlRIfPPjwd3olfUTaqoS8ykhw==&ch=qlsVf1xYivdx0frXA8kRabhzJRpRxxywFq5OBpZK44yVjZ0TrkEzsg==).

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Say it with me: Abolish. The. Filibuster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — It’s time to abolish the filibuster. Here’s why: In 2020, we witnessed record-breaking voter turnout and an outpouring of support for Democratic reforms including voting rights, reproductive rights, climate action, criminal justice and immigration reform, and so much more. However, as soon as the new Congress was sworn in this January, Mitch McConnell and the rest of the Republican Party did everything to stand in our way. They have been determined to thwart our attempts at passing legislation demanded by voters during the 2020 election. From passing the _American Rescue Plan Act_ to provide relief from the COVID-19 pandemic — without a single Republican vote in the House or Senate — to working this very moment to lift the debt ceiling and pass the _Build Back Better Act_ , Mitch McConnell has kept his word: **“One-hundred percent of our focus is on stopping this new administration.”** And McConnell has got the filibuster to help him do it. The filibuster is not a vital check and balance of power. The GOP leverages it to block bills that would help the American people thrive and protect our sacred right to vote. Historically, Southern Senators have used the filibuster to block civil rights bills and even anti-lynching legislation. It must not be used again to disenfranchise people of color. However, using the filibuster to block any bill that can’t get 60 votes is a new phenomenon. It’s all part of the GOP’s plan to block legislative reform while passing voter suppression laws and abortion bans at the state level, leaving Congress and Democrats powerless to respond. Freezing our ability to pass reforms is not the intended purpose of the filibuster. Mitch McConnell and the GOP have turned the filibuster into their greatest weapon in thwarting the will of the American people and preventing progress — especially now that they’re in the minority. I want to be direct: The filibuster must go. Right now. Before it’s too late. [**If you’re with me, sign my petition demanding Senate Democrats abolish the filibuster. The future of our country depends on ending this archaic rule that serves no purpose in Washington, other than to prevent meaningful debate and votes on legislation demanded by voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37194185/310351042/674655292?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211007_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211007_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQyYTQzYS04NTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJmDylHl3nzkh2pGblVFiNq5X4CMUhLGO2uTxs98o0s=&emci=37d2a43a-8527-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3fd2a43a-8527-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=33917617) | | [SIGN MY PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37194186/310351043/674655292?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211007_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211007_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQyYTQzYS04NTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJmDylHl3nzkh2pGblVFiNq5X4CMUhLGO2uTxs98o0s=&emci=37d2a43a-8527-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3fd2a43a-8527-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=33917617)

body:

#

Friends —
We want to ask you to do something big and important today — something that less than 1/10th of 1 percent of Mark Kelly supporters currently do.
[**Use this link to make a $3 monthly recurring contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211007-1-subs&recurring=true&t=1&refcode2=1487_6688874_281EPK&akid=1487%2E6688874%2E281EPK)

When this recurring donation hits every 7th of the month, we want it to serve as a reminder of your long term commitment to re-elect Mark Kelly, and the action you took for a brighter future.

name: Team Cranley
subject: Did you see John’s message, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Bumping this to the top of your inbox. | Hey there, We wanted to make sure you saw John’s important message about the climate crisis and his plans to combat it as Ohio’s governor, so we’re bumping this back to the top of your inbox. Like John says, expanding renewable energy sources to build a clean, renewable energy economy that will create new jobs just makes sense. If you approve of his plan, **_[click here to become an Official Citizen Endorser,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37196727/310362535/1655042049?refcode=ea.94b82fd1-8b27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&mc=ea.94b82fd1-8b27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGI4MmZkMS04YjI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-12n0YSa8x4tMBYSTVn5svScWLQE7CNGq0iXj_cHr28=&emci=c1e2cc2d-8227-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=94b82fd1-8b27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22604289)_** and don’t forget to read John’s email below! **[ENDORSE THE PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37196728/310362536/1655042049?refcode=ea.94b82fd1-8b27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&mc=ea.94b82fd1-8b27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGI4MmZkMS04YjI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-12n0YSa8x4tMBYSTVn5svScWLQE7CNGq0iXj_cHr28=&emci=c1e2cc2d-8227-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=94b82fd1-8b27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22604289)** We appreciate your support, Team Cranley

**Begin forwarded message:**
> Friend – Back in August, the U.N. issued a dire warning about the future of our planet. **We’re now on a certain course towards catastrophic global warming and extreme weather.** But more recently, we’ve learned that _even if nations achieve their goals of reducing carbon emissions_ , we’re still headed in the wrong direction. **We need to take bold, decisive action at every level of government, starting right now.** That’s why I’ve committed to implementing innovative renewable energy plans in at least ten Ohio counties a year as governor — exactly as I did in Cincinnati. **We’ll build major solar power installations across the state, creating 1,300 jobs a year and reducing Ohio’s carbon footprint by replacing fossil fuels with clean energy sources._It just makes sense._** **_[I need to know if you support our plan, friend. We guess it’s easy to get confused about where to spend your campaign money when you’re taking tens of thousands from Big Oil & Big Gas. Dr. Yadira is not in this race to serve special interests — she’s running because she knows what families across Colorado face every single day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you! Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. name: Team Kilmer
subject: Response requested from Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

We've got a lot to do to address pressing issues facing our nation. That's why Derek and the Democratic House majority are working hard passing legislation to protect our environment, expand health care access, speed up economic recovery, and so much more.

There's still more legislation to write and democracy reforms to be made, and right now, Derek wants to hear from you. Knowing what's most important to YOU and your family is one of the ways Derek can serve you best.

**[Will you take Derek's Fall Survey to let him know what your top priorities and concerns are? We'd like to start sharing results with Derek tonight, so please submit your responses right away.](https://act.myngp.com/el/hOYGxflkWWi9ZMa7WR4PCda-9X5F9SsukkYGIA3wuF4=/Do1cgnhcAhR3Nt1nkLyId9URV_L3zYzjG3VyNRDD4LY=?ms=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&refcode=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&source=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/hOYGxflkWWi9ZMa7WR4PCda-9X5F9SsukkYGIA3wuF4=/Do1cgnhcAhR3Nt1nkLyId9URV_L3zYzjG3VyNRDD4LY=?ms=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&refcode=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&source=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
---

It may not seem like it, but the 2022 elections are barely a year away. That means we're running out of time to enact President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda and make meaningful progress before election season starts.

Whether it's investing in our infrastructure and local economies, reforming our democracy, defending our environment, or something else: Derek wants to know what you want Congress to focus on right now. And surveys like this are one of the best ways he can learn what's on your mind.

**[Your responses are important to Derek, so please take a moment to send in your Fall Survey responses. Make your voice heard by taking the survey today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/hOYGxflkWWi9ZMa7WR4PCda-9X5F9SsukkYGIA3wuF4=/Do1cgnhcAhR3Nt1nkLyId9URV_L3zYzjG3VyNRDD4LY=?ms=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&refcode=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&source=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/hOYGxflkWWi9ZMa7WR4PCda-9X5F9SsukkYGIA3wuF4=/XKmqV1bGcWIODIlWDjqwPTtRcZuQTPtJZe24CntfUK0=?refcode=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_fall21_esrv_gq_act_svy_tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&email)

name: News Alert (via karenbass.com)
subject: BREAKING: EMILY's List endorses Karen Bass for Mayor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
body:
We know it's early, but we had to share the news:
Hello, we know it's early, but we had to share the news: **EMILY 's List just endorsed Karen Bass for Mayor of Los Angeles!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WFklCpN1KJwJQQY7AITZwGSPAp73eWLelmPESuyMxKM=/BOp1L2xn67ihBZz8vK-pAU-162dHwWE8lD6dWtagyYk=?ms=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alimg&refcode=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alimg&source=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alimg&utm_campaign=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alimg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

Momentum is building behind this campaign, and we're fired up. **[Will you chip in $10 now to stand with EMILY's List and kickstart Karen's historic campaign for mayor?](https://act.myngp.com/el/WFklCpN1KJwJQQY7AITZwGSPAp73eWLelmPESuyMxKM=/BOp1L2xn67ihBZz8vK-pAU-162dHwWE8lD6dWtagyYk=?ms=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/WFklCpN1KJwJQQY7AITZwGSPAp73eWLelmPESuyMxKM=/BOp1L2xn67ihBZz8vK-pAU-162dHwWE8lD6dWtagyYk=?ms=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_albbt1&refcode=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_albbt1&source=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

If elected, Karen would be the first woman mayor and second Black mayor in LA's history. EMILY's List is behind her one hundred percent because they know that Los Angeles is ready for a pro-choice woman to lead in City Hall, and Karen has the vision to deliver real progress for Angelenos.

Karen is ready to take bold action to tackle homelessness, ensure good-paying jobs are available, fight climate change, and make equality a cornerstone of this city.

**[The people of Los Angeles deserve a leader who will fight for social and economic justice and move this city forward. If you're with EMILY's List, chip in $10 now to support Karen's historic campaign >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/WFklCpN1KJwJQQY7AITZwGSPAp73eWLelmPESuyMxKM=/BOp1L2xn67ihBZz8vK-pAU-162dHwWE8lD6dWtagyYk=?ms=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211007_emlys_fndd_gq_act___na_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Grateful to have you on this team,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of LA. Thanks to LA's matching funds program, donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Phil
subject: following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| |
---
Hey, friend – Phil here from Marco's campaign team. I have a strategy meeting tomorrow morning with Marco, so I need to check on that survey we sent around yesterday. It looks like we're still missing a few key responses, and Marco mentioned he really wanted to hear your insights – so **[can you please take a minute now to finish our quick survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37199791/310373751/-503330418?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk250-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODQzZDVjYS05MjI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGmansuUaYwAumZoxBSRFfUreu3j08eEyOHFNtj8AhQ=&emci=b9bfa89f-0c26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=8843d5ca-9227-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=6085109)**
Grassroots input from folks like you has been essential to crafting our strategy – and with election experts officially calling this race a toss-up, I know we're well on our way to flipping Arizona blue and finally defeating the GOP extremists holding our state back.

But to make _sure_ we win, we need as much on-the-ground information as possible. That's why we reached out to a handful of top supporters like you to complete our campaign's strategy survey. But time is tight, and I need all these responses before our midnight deadline. **So please, friend, will you take just a moment to complete our survey now and help us flip Arizona blue?**

body:
#
_A group called Center Forward is running ads supporting centrist Democrats working to whittle down the [$3.5 trillion reconciliation] bill. The group receives nearly $1.5 million per year from PhRMA._ -New York Times, 10/4/21
Peter,
Big Pharma and Wall Street are spending millions to stop progressive legislation AND boost conservative Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema. The rich and powerful refuse to even give everyday people a break on their skyrocketing prescription drug costs. **Big Pharma has spent more than $15 MILLION on lobbying this year.**
Corporations and corporate Democrats hold a lot of power, but so do we. We’ve built a progressive voting bloc in Congress, and we’re seeing the power we have after stopping centrists from passing a weaker, more moderate bill. We’re ready to keep growing our power by electing more Justice Democrats to combat the influence of Big Pharma in Congress.
[Can you help fuel our work to elect Justice Democrats and fight for progressive change? Bernie, the Squad, and other Justice Democrats in Congress are holding the line, and we need to be there to strengthen their fight!](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=e05857c353&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=f83d70a3d7&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
We’re directly challenging one of the corporate Democrats backed by Big Pharma: Rep. Henry Cuellar. Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros, a progressive fighter for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal and immigrant justice, is running to defeat Cuellar and grow our fight in Congress.
But Big Pharma and Wall Street will be backing Cuellar every step of the way, just like they’re doing right now. **So we need to counter their unlimited money with a powerful grassroots campaign funded by the people. That’s where you come in.**
[In order to build winning campaigns for Justice Democrats, we need money right now. So, can you chip in $10 to fuel our work to elect more Justice Democrats and transform the Democratic Party?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=3cf3291e4d&e=5a4b10d0ec)
Legislating in Congress is completely different these days, after we elected 10 Justice Democrats to fight for the people. Let’s elect even more, and change Congress for good.
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=8c9bfda1a7&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
[Donate »](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=4cf736f109&e=5a4b10d0ec)

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ziitt14k6349mnvq5ls8db5jjl1bev1bqlk91tkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmcpoj2srichombcr4slqr2t5ge6pjad1gedrr8s36mloe9p1iehr6ap9m6pob0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cr664ob6or0ethmcc5gm9h3csh5u)
_*Sponsored Message*_
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z75l1eb3ej3557qr1bvrarjgrs7lhfn4lc6rm67g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's [**RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7okl3cpim2difnj5tvcd63mgdhok2q3alol3tn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times '_ recent "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." **" Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written."** Outrageous! _The New York Times '_ stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times '_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5pcvsvooqnjj9f03q5uoen2u5b36c6ttksnbhfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd0veguegtalqv3dsu7ocmdup7uqrltushgunb9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." This free course is called **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the "fake news" _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We've now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj0bca6896t6g0o5jm9efmf87bbacgi8fp6vohag_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we're doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeo6ujqat4tee0kam5fn21kk32dnkjr3eq6mhmf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh66p76chh2bs) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives' attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY!
