clean_body: I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. Sponsored Message Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times ' recent "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." " Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written." Outrageous! The New York Times ' stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times ' efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times ' "1619 Project." This free course is called " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the "fake news" New York Times. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We've now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we're doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives' attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. clean_body: We need you now -- more than ever... | Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ The Left is testing us, Peter. Ever since Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott announced his campaign for re-election to the United States Senate, Democrats from across the nation have been pouring money into South Carolina to defeat him. Remember: in the 2020 Election, the Democrats raised and spent more than $120 MILLION to try to seize control of South Carolina’s US Senate Seat. This time, they plan to spend even more... The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to hold onto power. That’s why we need to be ready to stand strong and hold the line. | | | | | The Left’s “majority” in the United States Senate ultimately comes down to a single vote. That’s why they’re so desperate to seize power in South Carolina. A win over Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott would secure their majority and unlock their total socialist agenda! (The Left is terrified of Tim Scott because of what he represents. Through his example, millions of people are seeing that the American Dream still exists -- if you’re prepared to work hard for it.) | Thank you. Tim Scott Alerts

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. I need 1,000 endorsements today to prove I have the support of voters, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37200438/310375387/958816626?source=20211005_em_pet_b1_tv_30opno&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ5MjJlMC05NDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGf2Cg0uMyrKMrcJ8TpFqVKIyBI17Q9aOgHwWNHeM7Q=&emci=28afad63-b326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=7ad922e0-9427-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889) | | [Endorse Tony!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37200439/310375388/958816626?source=20211005_em_pet_b1_tv_30opno&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ5MjJlMC05NDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGf2Cg0uMyrKMrcJ8TpFqVKIyBI17Q9aOgHwWNHeM7Q=&emci=28afad63-b326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=7ad922e0-9427-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

Virginia is the highest profile race in the country, and Trump has endorsed Youngkin five separate times. Youngkin bought the Republican nomination by doubling down on Trump’s “big lie,” and recently, Youngkin again called for auditing voting machines.

name: Kelly Hall
subject: 🚨 Announcing our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Ballot measures are under attack, so we launched this campaign to fight back >> | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37201362/310377743/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUyMzI2Ni05NzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKP4mjZGUc1tkWWEAACGoy-M6hRn-q93xMUPCFXLsf0=&emci=04619249-8f27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c0523266-9727-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=561582) | Friends, **I’m excited to announce that today, The Fairness Project announced its Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign. ** Ballot measures are a core part of our democracy. In the face of partisan gridlock, voters have been able to leverage ballot measures as a way to enact progress. _But as of late, extremist legislators have started fighting back against the ballot measure process_ — introducing legislation that would make it harder to pass important measures at the ballot box. **Since the beginning of 2021, at least 87 bills have been introduced that would burden or harm the ballot measure process.** **That’s why, earlier today, we launched the Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign. We’re committed to protecting this critical piece of our democracy. ** _What does this mean?_ Where we need to bring litigation, we will litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we will run aggressive campaigns to stop these anti-democratic bills. And where the legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we will fight to win those ballot campaigns. clean_body: Ballot measures are under attack, so we launched this campaign to fight back >> | | Friends, I’m excited to announce that today, The Fairness Project announced its Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign. Ballot measures are a core part of our democracy. In the face of partisan gridlock, voters have been able to leverage ballot measures as a way to enact progress. But as of late, extremist legislators have started fighting back against the ballot measure process — introducing legislation that would make it harder to pass important measures at the ballot box. Since the beginning of 2021, at least 87 bills have been introduced that would burden or harm the ballot measure process. That’s why, earlier today, we launched the Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign. We’re committed to protecting this critical piece of our democracy. What does this mean? Where we need to bring litigation, we will litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we will run aggressive campaigns to stop these anti-democratic bills. And where the legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we will fight to win those ballot campaigns. = = Of the 87 bills introduced this year, 20 have already passed that make the ballot measure process more difficult. So we’re going on offense to protect the ballot measure process — because in recent years, it’s one of the only ways everyday people have been able to win. Since 2016, we’ve won 20 of the 21 ballot campaigns we’ve worked on. Those wins helped us bring workers higher wages, improve and expand health care access, secure more paid leave, and so many other life-changing improvements for more than 17 million working people in America. I’ll be honest — the assault by extremist legislators on this most-democratic tool is highly organized and well-funded. We’re partnering with other national and local organizations to fight back, but if we’re going to have the resources necessary to protect our ballot measure process, we need your help. = = Thank you for your support, Kelly Hall Executive Director The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please click =.** = Contributions or gifts to The Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to The Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at The Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . body:
My opponent is attempting to assassinate my character and I simply cannot let the lies go unanswered. The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2fee0caa0dbd447fab0364ce6491269c&_e=1xG1ONvOH2dQgMwda0tCGEUP_-A2qrNv_VFGeQyiehlzFdaKitEpqIBg9eCv-bFYZ3lq5xf856a25xri3OP5EOR7ye3SfhRf4WWXuBk_BdwEAZIU7MYoJ9OflHEL7cQGiQ-sFjFZ8K2akZA648ubUG0Flb1nLivp6DtfRuUEOa1sPcSqFwMBj7Qx1qOXU_wRMnrg4rrZMwpUtfC3lOi0XV8mgzXmI_q6eJ_Nr1Qi2OlUfo9YuoU-_LsXNyC2nOKdZFx1srFewQv2IuXwlCH0ww1R2FrxqaYljWCI9pAbLl-DX9kXoBihMd8QyCzrwJmx1ty5TZtNdm-5KrG2H8oXFEcT3KCJyPiFl4u_Eg7SQC8ZSp2a3V_35TWFX7jxXg56hpa_Jza8BNhSw-S5kZUE99gJ6-N2Fu9f1B5YBW7yKCkZhljRi1h6zKoMFfoXOSU8WliKvEu19qJQcgbC0I8c_g%3D%3D)

Peter,

**I need to start this email to you by apologizing**. Not because I’ve done anything wrong, but because in a moment I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign in order to help me fight back against the latest smear campaign being perpetrated by my progressive opponent and the Democrat power brokers in Washington, D.C.

I’m fully aware that it was just the end of the quarter and you’ve likely been enjoying an email inbox that’s not completely full of campaigns asking for contributions.

I am in the same boat. Having said that, my opponent is attempting to assassinate my character and I simply cannot let the lies go unanswered.

Let me explain what’s going on.

**In February** , I launched a charitable foundation that I named the 15:17 Trust, an organization founded to serve veterans in ways the government cannot; think of the veterans on the side of the road begging for money, those are the veterans I’m referring to. We’ve all seen them.

**The truth is** , it takes a long time to get a well-oiled organization up and running. Time that became scarce the instant I announced my re-match against lying Democrat Peter DeFazio in May. At that point, it also became a conflict of interest to run a charitable organization and run for Congress at the same time.

**But do you think that stopped my opponent from lying and distorting the truth about a charity he knows nothing about? Nope.**

Since the original article came out earlier in the week, it’s been picked up by every publication in Oregon. I won’t stand for the lies – and I certainty do not intent to become a victim of character assassination. **[Would you please help me fight back against the lies Democrats are spreading about me and the work we’re doing to bring some sanity back to Oregon?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2fee0caa0dbd447fab0364ce6491269c&_e=1xG1ONvOH2dQgMwda0tCGEUP_-A2qrNv_VFGeQyiehlzFdaKitEpqIBg9eCv-bFYZ3lq5xf856a25xri3OP5EOR7ye3SfhRf4WWXuBk_BdwEAZIU7MYoJ9OflHEL7cQGiQ-sFjFZ8K2akZA648ubUG0Flb1nLivp6DtfRuUEOa1sPcSqFwMBj7Qx1qOXU_wRMnrg4rrZMwpUtfC3lOi0XV8mgzXmI_q6eJ_Nr1Qi2OlUfo9YuoU-_LsXNyC2nOKdEIV-zxQyie5vxm2X_zp9sGjnRmtWQ8fCEev4HpwIyuqW-ty2V5pMNtZO5mgaWt8PBuEWYJYLYfVk1mdeL3q4YB5WMZyaxkgsqzyv6AjtYrRK3ft_3Hyhza0qHRVoc4TqbVb9_0u8YE4YYVP46Ln_sO-abUI0QZxNZez4EFNPWPCyWQocY8Td4yoasEbxxPy8ql3qRQBANg71X5-8TpMEjA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: My opponent is attempting to assassinate my character and I simply cannot let the lies go unanswered. The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | Peter, I need to start this email to you by apologizing. Not because I’ve done anything wrong, but because in a moment I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign in order to help me fight back against the latest smear campaign being perpetrated by my progressive opponent and the Democrat power brokers in Washington, D.C. I’m fully aware that it was just the end of the quarter and you’ve likely been enjoying an email inbox that’s not completely full of campaigns asking for contributions. I am in the same boat. Having said that, my opponent is attempting to assassinate my character and I simply cannot let the lies go unanswered. Let me explain what’s going on. In February , I launched a charitable foundation that I named the 15:17 Trust, an organization founded to serve veterans in ways the government cannot; think of the veterans on the side of the road begging for money, those are the veterans I’m referring to. We’ve all seen them. The truth is , it takes a long time to get a well-oiled organization up and running. Time that became scarce the instant I announced my re-match against lying Democrat Peter DeFazio in May. At that point, it also became a conflict of interest to run a charitable organization and run for Congress at the same time. But do you think that stopped my opponent from lying and distorting the truth about a charity he knows nothing about? Nope. Since the original article came out earlier in the week, it’s been picked up by every publication in Oregon. I won’t stand for the lies – and I certainty do not intent to become a victim of character assassination. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | He doesn’t have any “dirt” on me, so he and Democrats in DC had to fabricate some. They’re trying to tarnish my image by saying that I used campaign funds to pay myself for charity work that happened. That’s a lie. My opponent has been in the DC swamp for far too long - and it shows. He’s willing to fabricate lies against a political opponent. It strikes me as very soviet - just like the legislation he’s trying to get jammed through Congress as I write this. The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7r0q21msn0lap5a06khtndkltueluk69ltp93gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh69or4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1jqupn714qksen76svqt69j19cvicvsj0hvigf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh69or4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zitta1mv2nggcjn92mg5e3kc84b2as0md1ap4hlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdh69or4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. name: Eddie Geller
subject: Why do we have to watch this happen over and over again?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Why is it that in the United States of America, in the year 2021, given all the comforts and luxuries and relatively pretty good quality of life at our fingertips, that we’re forced, again and again and again and again, to watch THIS happen: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37202579/310382390/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211007redflag_EG_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE5NDczMi05OTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rze3IKatLG1KYe6N46cVtMQpQAaZI3yIQJ3Jypuh9Lo=)
---
I'm pissed off today, friends. Why is it that in the United States of America, in the year 2021, given all the comforts and luxuries and relatively pretty good quality of life at our fingertips, that we’re forced, again and again and again and again, to watch THIS happen: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37202580/310382391/-300574569?s=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE5NDczMi05OTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rze3IKatLG1KYe6N46cVtMQpQAaZI3yIQJ3Jypuh9Lo=&emci=10194732-9927-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=12194732-9927-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12772398)
---
That’s a text message from a student — a child — to their mom during a mass shooting at their high school in Texas yesterday.
The worst part is — the part that has _always been_ true, always _will be_ true — is that we do not have to do this. We do not have to sit by and let this happen.
I want to talk about this because just a few days ago, my opponent Scott Franklin tweeted that “I will vote against the 2022 NDAA final passage unless the so-called ‘Red Flag’ law is removed from the bill.”
For those who don’t know, Red Flag laws, according to this [super helpful piece from the Washington Post about the myths surrounding them](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37202581/310382392/642930957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE5NDczMi05OTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rze3IKatLG1KYe6N46cVtMQpQAaZI3yIQJ3Jypuh9Lo=&emci=10194732-9927-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=12194732-9927-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12772398), “allow law enforcement — and in some states, family, household members and other community members — to ask a court to temporarily prevent people from possessing guns if they pose a risk to themselves or others.”
**Scott Franklin can’t even get behind removing guns from people even when there is _an imminent threat of violence_. This kind of extremism is why it is so hard to pass common-sense gun safety regulation.**
But you know what? What we _can_ do is work our butts off to ensure that people like Scott Franklin are never elected again to Congress, where their cowardice perpetuates the harm and violence caused every day by guns gone wild in our country.
[_**Make a contribution now if you want to help us work towards a vision of America where we never again have to read about another mass shooting.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37202582/310382393/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211007redflag_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE5NDczMi05OTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rze3IKatLG1KYe6N46cVtMQpQAaZI3yIQJ3Jypuh9Lo=)
Thanks for letting me vent.
— Eddie

| Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. Chip in now to help Eddie's campaign flip FL-15 blue!
---

name: Derek Dufresne
subject: Join the fight to secure our border!
body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Thank You, Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=997ec7ca66&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | Friends,

With many months ahead of us before the May primary, it is a unique honor to have the support of so many local elected officials.

In recent days, I was proud to add State Representative Joe Hohenstein to the list of endorsements from local leaders, also including State Representative Brian Sims, State Senator Sharif Street, and City Councilmember Mark Squilla.

It is rare for local elected officials to endorse primary candidates, especially so early in the race. We believe this speaks to our campaign’s ability to build strong coalitions with a diverse group of community leaders. The folks already holding office and fighting for positive change in Pennsylvania have seen my proven track record of serving the community and building bridges across Philadelphia – and for that, I am deeply grateful.

**[_Will you join our coalition to help me get to Harrisburg to fight for progress in Pennsylvania?_](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=826045d5f0&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

---
|
---
|

House that Represents You?
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e80b00bd9a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=fc161b2246&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Derek Marshall
subject: We need to maintain our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
First things first: we had an incredibly successful end to our financial quarter last month. **Thanks to all our loyal donors, we even surpassed our goal, putting us in a great position going into this month.** One thing I know for sure is that our message is resonating with people.

**Folks all across the country are getting excited about our race, because we’re building a winning campaign.** We know that California is losing one Congressional seat because of redistricting. That makes the stakes even higher for our race. If we can successfully flip this red district blue, we will help California keep the same number of seats and maintain Democrats’ majority in the house.

**Long story short, this is an important race for Democrats.** And if we can continue to raise at the pace we did last month, we’ll be ahead of our goals and can invest in more staff and voter engagement technology sooner. That means more resources for voter registration and for our field ground game.

It’s really important that we maintain the momentum we gained at the end of last month. Even though we raised more than we expected, donations always slow at the beginning of the month. **In order for us to stay on track this month, we need to raise $7,000 more this week. **

People showed up for our campaign in a big way last month, and I know we can do it again now. Remember, every dollar gets us one step closer to winning.**[If even half of the folks who read this gave us $12, we would reach our goal. Will be one of the donors who helps us reach our target this week so we can stay on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37203597/310386284/-171703089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI2NDA5Mi05YzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Zb24N-Hv5eLjF67o90XmnJv-5G_1KvtOiyWyGRgexQ=)**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

clean_body: Peter, First things first: we had an incredibly successful end to our financial quarter last month. Thanks to all our loyal donors, we even surpassed our goal, putting us in a great position going into this month. One thing I know for sure is that our message is resonating with people. Folks all across the country are getting excited about our race, because we’re building a winning campaign. We know that California is losing one Congressional seat because of redistricting. That makes the stakes even higher for our race. If we can successfully flip this red district blue, we will help California keep the same number of seats and maintain Democrats’ majority in the house. Long story short, this is an important race for Democrats. And if we can continue to raise at the pace we did last month, we’ll be ahead of our goals and can invest in more staff and voter engagement technology sooner. That means more resources for voter registration and for our field ground game. It’s really important that we maintain the momentum we gained at the end of last month. Even though we raised more than we expected, donations always slow at the beginning of the month. In order for us to stay on track this month, we need to raise $7,000 more this week. People showed up for our campaign in a big way last month, and I know we can do it again now. Remember, every dollar gets us one step closer to winning.= In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

**Every Thursday at 7 pm CT, I host a livestream on YouTube to discuss the most pressing policy topics of the week.**

There's a lot going on, so I like to have this opportunity to cut through the noise and speak directly with supporters like you so you can hear more about my position on these issues.

Our next discussion takes place tonight at 7 pm. We'll cover what's going on in Congress with Biden's Build Back Better Act, the debt ceiling, and Texas' special session on voter penalties, the heartbeat law, and redistricting. Tune in as I break it all down.

clean_body: | = Quick update, friend. Every Thursday at 7 pm CT, I host a livestream on YouTube to discuss the most pressing policy topics of the week. There's a lot going on, so I like to have this opportunity to cut through the noise and speak directly with supporters like you so you can hear more about my position on these issues. Our next discussion takes place tonight at 7 pm. We'll cover what's going on in Congress with Biden's Build Back Better Act, the debt ceiling, and Texas' special session on voter penalties, the heartbeat law, and redistricting. Tune in as I break it all down. If you haven't yet, please take a moment to to receive notifications when the show starts. For questions or topics you'd like to see me cover please respond to this email directly and we'll go over them as time allows. Yours, Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a a computer engineer, former education non-profit president, and Democrat running for the new Democratic-leaning congressional district in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our Republican opponent wrote themselves a $3 MILLION check to boost their campaign.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211007-2916-header&t=1&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)
Peter, this is not really how I wanted to start my Thursday. 😂
**The Philadelphia Inquirer just reported that our Republican opponent wrote themselves a $3 MILLION check to boost their campaign.** They’re spending the first million right out of the gate on a big TV ad campaign statewide.
Just to put that in context, our entire campaign raised $2.7 million over the last three months. More than anyone else in PA has raised in any quarter so far! We’ve had more than 150,000 people chip in. But one self-funder candidate was just able to write themselves a check and instantly top our total.
I wish it weren’t this way, Peter. But in the last midterms, 8-in-10 Senate races were won by the candidate who spent the most. So we have to compete dollar for dollar. The good news is that there’s more of us, and strength in numbers.
[**Help us respond to this $3 million check — make a $5 donation now to turn PA blue. Every donation matters, whether big or small. We’re in it together.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211007-2916&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211007-2916&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)**
CNN says Pennsylvania is the number one toss-up race on the Senate map. Plus the latest poll shows we’re the ONLY Democrat who beats all the Republicans.
The bad news is that our Republican opponents are going to be extremely well funded. The good news is that we have 150,000+ grassroots supporters — and if everyone gives a little bit we can compete with any self-funders on the other side.
[**Add a $5 donation today to help us respond to this $3 million Republican cash surge today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211007-2916&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211007-2916&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)**
I’m so grateful to be in this campaign with all of you. Together we can match anything they throw our way.
John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211007-2916-footer&t=42&refcode2=2916_434096_h4Izj9&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=2916%2E434096%2Eh4Izj9)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
New research from Planned Parenthood and In Our Own Voice: National Black Women's Reproductive Justice Agenda shows that over 36 million women and people who could become pregnant could LOSE access to reproductive healthcare if the Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade!
This is a crisis, and we need all hands on deck! [_**Make your voice heard! Stand with Gwen and demand the Supreme Court uphold Roe v. Wade!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/KyYH4BWLUUpS9TdW3UWHVcYfGwFLEFHBLfNsW9bEhb8=/VYG5J5AljEgX7Krm_bbUzkTnljwpF8dd3Q39Hi5zOF8=?recipientId=puUdjqVRPkzsOjguzhPDH3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Wisconsin is listed as one of the most at-risk states! And restricting abortion access harms Black, Latino, and Indigenous people the most severely. Gwen is doing everything in her power to protect the constitutionally protected right for a woman to make her own decisions about her body. [_**Stand with Gwen and women across America - protect Roe v. Wade now!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/KyYH4BWLUUpS9TdW3UWHVcYfGwFLEFHBLfNsW9bEhb8=/VYG5J5AljEgX7Krm_bbUzkTnljwpF8dd3Q39Hi5zOF8=?recipientId=puUdjqVRPkzsOjguzhPDH3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

subject: Tell the Senate: Pass the Women's Health Protection Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Republicans in state legislatures across the country are passing restrictive abortion legislation at a record pace. This year alone, 561 abortion restrictions -- and counting -- have been introduced in 47 states, and 97 have already been signed into law. Included in these is Texas' extreme 6 week abortion ban. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205230/310391325/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1MThjMS1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCiLxJjlgn5C4AP0FC3q0ktUBrUyoYA2yRAbQvO5c24=&emci=3ae1e560-d326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=49b518c1-a027-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Republicans in state legislatures across the country are passing restrictive abortion legislation at a record pace. This year alone, 561 abortion restrictions -- and counting -- have been introduced in 47 states, and 97 have already been signed into law. Included in these is Texas' extreme 6 week abortion ban.

Though Texas' ban was temporarily blocked by a federal judge last night, this fight is far from over. We can't afford to wait, that's why my Democratic colleagues in the House and I are taking action to defend reproductive rights.

Last month, I voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to protect _Roe v. Wade_ and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care, like waiting periods, unnecessary ultrasounds, hospital admitting privileges, hallway size requirements, and more. Now it is time for the Senate to take action and pass this critical legislation.

**[Will you add your name right away to call on the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205231/310391326/-2138041326?ms=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&refcode=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&source=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Yv4QvTRqYcnCQoocaXkGOtQxivwf60CMa1%2BAZwYJe7EK8Vi2u15eHfatKLMZMjalRZ57UBcUdnlZtky98P30sH5TUVdlCbPd3p0URcl%2F3ghM0Ogo4tyXMTD1PdGcFNf4xqsB9Brz8OUuNuHqMj8y2gDfXvjdOLL2BCdT%2FUy6RDk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1MThjMS1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCiLxJjlgn5C4AP0FC3q0ktUBrUyoYA2yRAbQvO5c24=&emci=3ae1e560-d326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=49b518c1-a027-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205232/310391328/-2138041326?ms=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&refcode=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&source=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Yv4QvTRqYcnCQoocaXkGOtQxivwf60CMa1%2BAZwYJe7EK8Vi2u15eHfatKLMZMjalRZ57UBcUdnlZtky98P30sH5TUVdlCbPd3p0URcl%2F3ghM0Ogo4tyXMTD1PdGcFNf4xqsB9Brz8OUuNuHqMj8y2gDfXvjdOLL2BCdT%2FUy6RDk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1MThjMS1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCiLxJjlgn5C4AP0FC3q0ktUBrUyoYA2yRAbQvO5c24=&emci=3ae1e560-d326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=49b518c1-a027-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)
---

By refusing to block Texas' abortion ban, the Supreme Court left the door open for other states to enact similar laws. It's only a matter of time before we see even more attacks on reproductive rights, so we need to take action to ensure that women, not state legislators, make their own healthcare decisions.

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House, I will always fight back against any attacks on _Roe_. I need to know you're with me in this important fight.

**[If you agree that everyone should have access to the reproductive care they need, no matter where they live, add your name to call on the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205233/310391329/-2138041326?ms=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&refcode=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&source=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211007_whpa1_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Yv4QvTRqYcnCQoocaXkGOtQxivwf60CMa1%2BAZwYJe7EK8Vi2u15eHfatKLMZMjalRZ57UBcUdnlZtky98P30sH5TUVdlCbPd3p0URcl%2F3ghM0Ogo4tyXMTD1PdGcFNf4xqsB9Brz8OUuNuHqMj8y2gDfXvjdOLL2BCdT%2FUy6RDk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1MThjMS1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCiLxJjlgn5C4AP0FC3q0ktUBrUyoYA2yRAbQvO5c24=&emci=3ae1e560-d326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=49b518c1-a027-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)**

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?**

name: Marisa Wood
subject: FW: Big news
body:
CA-23, the district where I'm taking on career politician and GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy, is almost certainly going to see a shift in boundaries, bringing new voters into the fold. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205321/310391562/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTE0OGVlNi1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJurx_uSv9fYy3V1MZeD966JlgRP_kifbVr15P4C3xM=)
Friend,

Yesterday, my team reached out with some important redistricting news.

CA-23, the district where I'm taking on career politician and GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy, is almost certainly going to see a shift in boundaries, bringing new voters into the fold.

**This is a huge opportunity for us, but we're still coming up $4,413 short on our end-of-week goal and I could use a boost from you today.**

Big news, friend.

According to the 2020 Census, California's 23rd District -- where veteran teacher Marisa Wood is facing off against Kevin McCarthy -- grew by more than 10%.

With redistricting well underway, we don't know exactly how much more competitive CA-23 will become, but we do know our district lines will change, bringing thousands of new voters into the fold.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205328/310391570/-787496292?refcode=em-10721-full-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTE0OGVlNi1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJurx_uSv9fYy3V1MZeD966JlgRP_kifbVr15P4C3xM=)

Peter,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1499e72f092646b0b9bd5927a3212cfa&_e=4RMdlxuA9cwPn3JGToDXf1jAiVZpuKB94npMKiI1edc6RVIxeEMaZjDXZl9qI_BLFLp5V0KD_DKnHToqS5kqKAI5phnxjwiDMIgKwd1PpY5I3qEBhl_uljz47Kal3WMIopYcu0RGoH0eKG7XchpEeE0wdfXgBNUoLCx4K9vLD4LabGhauwVOBqg_TpHksbTIujPeOAWRH2oKtI6AgN5xhUWOG7BbpVA2ByBFPZpAg73pfiYD8bdrTtXDnxrarPRUxmYIZ3ajFYFl0IHCQ1n8ZL38sJ93jk_u8uLqLETf7IEGTSwuyEVBJeNCAJ1DQM0dDJu7DsS-vAIQZc5IG8jDfZQDIySet8LYnZI9Okw97LrH0qHCW2eHtJyi2lzgYD3hY37o1lfqvNTM_O42aVafT7zdDhMIpdB45nVvBnItvXYKapXjA28qWN274VFgdEjT6aU7upGHs_xd3NQAedTXOjqWj5q7Dh1F70Nr_jmPQ5U%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37205614/310392718/-2023814932?refcode=20211007.4_JC_10AW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmI1MThjMS1hMDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OiE2DgjfmFqj_IIJEu733MPwbk11telIZt9f1PR64g=)

| | Derek, early voting is underway, and Virginians are already voting for Governor.

That means every single day between now and November 2nd is Election Day.

**In case you missed the good news, folks: I’m officially running for lieutenant governor of our great state.** I am announcing my candidacy because I believe Texas deserves a lieutenant governor committed to honest leadership and problem solving. In 2018, I went to counties that hadn’t seen a Democrat in years. I listened to folks — red voters, blue voters, and those in between. We were outspent 10-to-1, but we ran the closest race for lieutenant governor in 20 years, nearly defeating Dan Patrick. In 2022, we will finish what we started. That’s why we’re building a grassroots movement from the ground up powered by everyday Texans like you — not corporate PACs and wealthy lobbyists. So, I’m kindly asking you: **[By bringing Texans together, we will elect honest leadership to the state office and move Texas forward. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Re: The most vulnerable Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbe9b0a76f694d2c8737c6038d5dcb64&_e=Bx1WImxroICl01tk6aNSIERSAuewtK015yulc4Gqs2yFaxJbr2tLGq6bKgIUDWKf57uHHOAd0yqnMk3BqU-yD7Ltgz-_xfnTKxEFp1TSCLjG812mBIuqbp17F-efBMzP6W7jAwLZzmOdYovEMmmjDjz9rlpwfsWiLg7NmKOlolUYW1fsmf76xQdFkU9d-ZX_nyHxmWO3K_Mt06ii4vXH_cAFqcWFybIiLfvGNr7va1s5uUqG9Eu_ky-DCniA1giybx7lYlYUtvbGgZBoOJ07Zx0_ItAN0CMEMJnuR6VKS4jAOD-Hfn5L3EG7R1xAuK5i0qFheeIKT8erM7ijqxtNXQvqau6H6w9Xan2WCrk2ZuZB8jHEj-Tnkg2uQb-jjWYI8Z1iXpHqtHz7TqcHLjwOSlGhYOKmQFBTEWxkhlC2bXzzouJmoeknB2xUrpodrTcv23l41l_zo0Mp3d9zUGMpjw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

clean_body: Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” | Fellow American, Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about. First , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the "most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection." That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line. If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months. Second , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one. We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal. I appreciate your consideration! name: Nikki Fried
subject: RE: Texas Abortion Ban
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Last night, a Federal Judge halted enforcement of Texas’ dangerous abortion ban.

This is a win, but let’s be clear: Florida Republicans are moving forward with anti-choice legislation as we speak. We’re never going to stop fighting back.

Team, as the only lifelong pro-choice candidate running for governor, I’m asking directly for your support. Click here to chip in now and support our fight for abortion rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-abortion-rights-oct?refcode=1007]

Ron DeSantis and Republicans in the legislature are following Texas’ lead, regardless of this court decision.

We’re already fighting back. And as Florida’s first woman Governor, I promise to veto any anti-choice legislation that comes across my desk.

But friends, I need your help to win this race. Please click here to chip in now and help elect Florida’s first woman governor and first pro-choice governor in over two decades. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-abortion-rights-oct?refcode=1007]

Last week’s Woman’s March showed how powerful we can be when we stand together for what’s right. Thanks for being part of the fight.

In Solidarity,

Nikki

Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: Sean Casten and the Debt Ceiling
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bb12cad1dea8/conforti-for-congress-5021997?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,
Sean Casten wants to eliminate the debt ceiling! This will allow for unlimited spending of YOUR tax dollars - with no stop-gaps in place, and saddle future generations with more debt. Our cost of living will just keep going up! Sean Casten does not care that he will make it even more expensive for the people of Illinois to provide for their families. He learned from generations of Illinois politicians at home, and is bringing their high debt, high tax policies to Washington.

We deserve real long term solutions to spending, not more inflation.
[Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=fc06de762d&e=25f4fa3311) to donate to my campaign and bring common sense to Congress.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Sean Casten wants to eliminate the debt ceiling! This will allow for unlimited spending of YOUR tax dollars - with no stop-gaps in place, and saddle future generations with more debt. Our cost of living will just keep going up! Sean Casten does not care that he will make it even more expensive for the people of Illinois to provide for their families. He learned from generations of Illinois politicians at home, and is bringing their high debt, high tax policies to Washington. We deserve real long term solutions to spending, not more inflation. to donate to my campaign and bring common sense to Congress. | Thank you, Niki Conforti Candidate Illinois 6th Congressional District | PS: Follow my campaign on , , and ! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Conforti for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37207556/310398223/683353327?refcode=20211007_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjgyMGY0Ny1hNzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NTuNTDZ8ZNKH08jo_bFZ9lLrG8keAiPz69bkXKTViM=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate. 2\. Republicans have made me their top target for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now: ** [**Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before 11:59 p.m. tonight to hit our goal, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37207557/310398224/683353327?refcode=20211007_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjgyMGY0Ny1hNzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NTuNTDZ8ZNKH08jo_bFZ9lLrG8keAiPz69bkXKTViM=) We're so close, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

name: Giffords.org
subject: Arlington, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Four victims were shot but all 1,800 students at that school are permanently changed by their experience.
#

Friends,
**Yesterday, an active shooter was reported at a high school in Arlington, Texas.**
Four victims were shot but all 1,800+ students and teachers at that school are permanently changed by their experience.
You can probably guess how Texas Senator Ted Cruz reacted...He offered his **prayers** for the students and teachers who had to run for their lives that day.
He went on to say there have been “far too many [shootings] at far too many schools.”
We can at least agree on that.. But we DISAGREE on what comes next.
Cruz seems to think we should wait for this problem to somehow fix itself—while WE believe it’s time for the Senate to finally take meaningful action to prevent shootings like this from happening in the future, starting with universal background checks.
Whose side are YOU on?
[**Make a difference in the fight to stop gun violence by making a $3 contribution to Giffords today. We’ll put your donation to work immediately by pressuring the Senate to pass the House’s background checks bill.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211007-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1077_3935704__peApr&akid=1077%2E3935704%2E_peApr)
As schools are reopening for in-person learning after the COVID-19 pandemic, we cannot let a return to school shootings threaten our kids’ lives.
What will it take for the Senate to act?
Pressure, and lots of it.
That’s why we must use our collective voices to call on the Senate to pass universal background checks to prevent gun violence.
[**And we need your support to do it so please, make a $3 donation to Giffords today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211007-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1077_3935704__peApr&akid=1077%2E3935704%2E_peApr)
We couldn’t do this work without your support, so thank you for whatever you can afford to give.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211007-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1077_3935704__peApr&akid=1077%2E3935704%2E_peApr)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1077%2E3935704%2E_peApr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: | | | | Joe Biden’s Disaster Friend, When President Trump was in office, we had record low unemployment, increasing wages, , and prosperity. It took Joe Biden only a few months to destroy the progress we made. Inflation is skyrocketing. From record gas prices to groceries, Americans cannot afford Joe Biden’s economy. Joe Biden and the radical left are continuing to push tax hikes and record spending despite the poor economic conditions that they themselves are creating. It is critical for true Conservatives to Take Back the House and end this economic nightmare. When I am elected, we will fight hard to cut taxes and regulations so that all hard-working Americans can prosper. I will work to roll back the disastrous policies put in place over the last 30 years by the Democrats. Together, we will make our economy great again. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

| | | _"Next month, voters in Central Ohio have the opportunity to defeat the corrupt special interests that have been in charge of our state for 30 years. That’s why I’m so excited to knock doors with my friend Allison Russo in the 15th District this weekend."_ -Mayor Nan Whaley

| _**Nan Whaley knows we can flip the 15th.**_ With with hard work and lots of great conversations with voters at their door, we can have a huge impact on the race in these last 26 days. So she's lacing up her sneakers to knock on some doors in Hilliard this Sunday, and inviting you to join!

body:
Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t |

**"NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT"**

Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for.

Both are false.

Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany.

**[Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3c6d8382aa1f4439a6c5f4ccae2ad9c0&_e=CBRD-sVN_WRUILzcR94savaT2lHLrS5bACAj0Cy6V__8Ts61Qoy8m7YxlV9H62033awpA_gmkXI9WdQiJcGCXgy9WqUEhbn_jToqpQO8TqfB7kHyrCATNmjsU5cCAnYBPL_z-YJN8aaQbgF5mB0sw6VrsgkbRdo2X2vvew9mn1l3rStIyTV14J9941Sh0k6mjq1gBR_QIVXBcHoOgWMQ6l7zBUkDK26MVQgXSFuzQj-h8Ihe6qmPoHFV3HmfcDl_z6Evw1hr3mJad1BlT86gyhek7LRprDJOytWtuizZngjA6e5BYhzEPVblBp21UOfKId-jduq0cay3tfUf-D8iUX0jRj9-6a5RbDgnzeZEUoBGVgSURl-WQc1UNuJsaQJOS0hOETOPjWIyGJLVUwCIs3NBSYGQOz8h8MyHKhk5HIT82dAEL3Mvj4JFrrMRP1luSIpBQlJQDO82a2Eqntao2wdTaB_O1MHDx_rSdJSTTVfJL_TgXLXdgYB9FclHyAh0)**

* Sweden: 43%
* France: 47%

Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?

Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America?

Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline.

clean_body: Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t | "NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT" Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for. Both are false. Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany. Germany: 49% Sweden: 43% France: 47% Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state? Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America? Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline. ** Thanks, NRSC HQ If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Republicans are going to hate our Q3 fundraising number.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted you to be among the first to hear it from me directly.
#

I have great news to share about our campaign, and I wanted you to be among the first to hear it from me directly.
We just finished adding up all the numbers, and it’s official: **Our campaign raised more than $1.5 million last quarter.**
Thank you!! This is an incredible testament to the thousands of people like you who power our campaign. Throughout our campaign, we have received donations from every single county one of North Carolina’s 100 counties.
The good news doesn’t stop there either. Based on all of the numbers released so far, our campaign raised more this quarter than any other candidate in this race in a single quarter.
In fact, it is more than any of North Carolina’s previous Democratic challengers have ever raised in the third quarter the year before the election.
Together, we are already making history, and this is all a clear sign that Democrats are ready to turn North Carolina blue.
But now we have to continue building on our momentum. Republicans are certainly going to take note of this, and super PACs will want to target our campaign to try to stop us. I need your help to get ready for those attacks.
[**So if you can, please consider making a contribution of any amount today. Republicans are willing to say or spend whatever it takes to try to buy this seat. We have to be ready for anything they throw our way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37209061/310406437/-572197399?refcode2=c132ebc7-ab27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211007-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTMyZWJjNy1hYjI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fD7zN_kBdRz8PBMcjJUOkksry4hwDpYSwh7Z0Qexwc=)
