Peter, four years ago I shared “My Thoughts on Good Leadership” [https://www.savannahnow.com/opinion/column/2017-10-07/wade-herring-my-thoughts-good-leadership] – with the intention that readers would appreciate hearing what I believe should be expected out of our leaders & elected officials.
https://www.savannahnow.com/opinion/column/2017-10-07/wade-herring-my-thoughts-good-leadership [https://www.savannahnow.com/opinion/column/2017-10-07/wade-herring-my-thoughts-good-leadership]
2017 was the first year with our former President, and there were already warning signs of what was to come.
I had no idea of running four years ago, but this op-ed speaks truly and clearly as to why I am running for office today – we need better representation for Georgians.
Four years ago, I closed my article by saying that the best is yet to come; that Georgia and America can be that beacon of hope we claim it to be. Come November 2022, we are going to prove that true.
Thank you for your continued support,
Wade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=100721whem] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com

**Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control, Derek, but I'm still falling $22,532 short of my $300,000 fundraising goal.**

**\-------------** **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIdibwXdITfhTTNGxLvXQmvjVGwW5MQf7HvHPpfuWJaxpxmuMfk2YXZWxL9KS89WQEEeMvqmNhiwAOCMRZMZZvVbnvBvXFGDqfkt_n4MZe1dSgJpvsYfXpCnHZhRwkhCEc0fTUitu-LRuYyYPz6t7JHfQDHa3kuJUI4Q-_4ErN9_QTz0WF3JCs_qTvVO3PMKRZZq7NFyDuQ7gJTr6xU_v8cElf_TYxbaBgsyP8YFfA2FBMgOhBnnIYAN3PE04IRY0d7Ru7INYUd_4z5JPWAd_AkI/3fy/zZdHlGyjShG-Jo3eG2fVnQ/h1/J8zVzIXmi3-4EPyIszUmu5QpEg8n7PYsgFECc5t2rD4)** This is the worst time for me to fall short of my can't-miss goal. The Florida GOP is preparing to launch a massive voter registration drive with the goal of flipping Florida red _permanently_. And between the Senate Republican campaign arm and Marco Rubio himself, the GOP has hauled in more than $32 million to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell.

So even though _The Cook Political Report_ increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to the GOP's advantage in Florida.

Since this grassroots team is so strong, I know that if we muster our willpower and dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. And right now, digging deep means hitting these grassroots fundraising goals today and all the way to Election Day.

[**So please, Derek, I urgently need you to help me make up this shortfall before the month is up. body:
Where do you stand, Peter?

subject: POLL: Do you support higher taxes?
disclaimer_text: paid for by increasing your tax bill?](http://links
body:
Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t |

**"NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT"**

Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for.

Both are false.

Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany.

**[Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=593f3d0e3545478e86cf0123b3dbb1d5&_e=0nrl8upucGNlcHxHL2aAwZ12d-tiDP2sl3wHvgJwNK43EqeLc_ED6qlfo9eULWYW2YNWlNnkz6Vl-QwUphi-U2mYslzlcZg7IEv2kaVgPInWHEYSpQqbfi92NLyVxBfot_-dcyyygl3VVePZfb6jDxDma1sseJGZiNiohO7c2DdTykf-MEqn9QyFpqedQj6ZvDbrr07rwYE3Bk-OKEX3G0SNm5nHM12X5fSpgWLn3TcHc6moCv_cDkj7EWCTmtA9FC3X5b0muznsexamWZhj7vURtGKbDPVOKxHFk7dEsjAYhYwvFHBER1HHSwIEM1-jvbgy4K6UKEpa-WPV2pnIzCwh6NV0T9dCka8eqcECX8TGYLl_E3dB7iF7aJ7Z3yDsyp30QHsEjCatr7IqyGIxsDIbmZwTNylGj0C3kuLJxQWc5kioeBaibB4RpIXCyrKowAd4XrdG71rUA5xGuit1UfGqhkvVecRmn869TxI5XUA%3D)**

* Sweden: 43%
* France: 47%

Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?

[** LET US KNOW TODAY->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=593f3d0e3545478e86cf0123b3dbb1d5&_e=0nrl8upucGNlcHxHL2aAwZ12d-tiDP2sl3wHvgJwNK43EqeLc_ED6qlfo9eULWYW2YNWlNnkz6Vl-QwUphi-U2mYslzlcZg7IEv2kaVgPInWHEYSpQqbfi92NLyVxBfot_-dcyyygl3VVePZfb6jDxDma1sseJGZiNiohO7c2DdTykf-MEqn9QyFpqedQj6ZvDbrr07rwYE3Bk-OKEX3G0SNm5nHM12X5fSpgWLn3TcHc6moCv_cDkj7EWCTmtA98Myd5LumrE3m8ws_hwD_IkwMb_rc2w3LrPuGooGgtv4VprYoDkDMVNrvmug0L3IIjudktG3tWdSBPT4GnWIZNAWIj6Idh1fBrVADeE2mlbxOTfIq1efzngsNCxLzKKsN-5nKW9hJ_YlULSi-NG6PP8Cy5KAGWy5oxHMVel1-VWJGX_-uu75LES2Ji_1oc9sjb1cQBUGlJnMYHNqf5XZxYbqfPpt5l6vCvuZ3_67b5J8%3D)
Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America?

Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline.

People are sick and tired of the radical Left and their stranglehold on Congress. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z588rqsk06qdpt26m2jg40j4pl5us1ali153jjfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdgm0ob4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zst7513lq8e6t3q71e7jrrqgbpk3vbh5ve2asvb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdgm0ob4cdh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zj56t5fdstoh0c3iqbbk9s9g21ou6s725c4cqh78_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdgm0ob4cdh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. From the recent surge of the Delta variant and relentless Republican attacks on voting and women's rights, to the changing climate around our rapidly heating planet, it's clear that we have to act _now_ if we want to make any substantial progress forward in this country.

**But we want to know what's on your to-do list too, friends, so Conor can be sure to elevate those issues on the campaign trail.**

Thank you.

**We told you that Louis DeJoy --_Trump 's hand-picked Postmaster General_ \-- is scheming to make mail delivery ****PERMANENTLY****slower and more expensive!!**

**"NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT"**

Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for.

Both are false.

Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany.

Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America?

Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline.

clean_body: Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t | "NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT" Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for. Both are false. Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany. Germany: 49% Sweden: 43% France: 47% Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state? Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America? Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline. ** Thanks, NRSC HQ If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! We need your help to keep our ad on the air, Peter.

Alex is running to represent Wisconsin so we can oust ineffective Ron Johnson, but this campaign is about so much more than that.

Alex is running because for over a decade, Wisconsinites have only had one Senator fighting for them in Washington. He wants to give Tammy Baldwin a true partner in the Senate.

With a proven track record of delivering real results for the people of Wisconsin - whether it’s creating good union jobs, paying a $15-dollar minimum wage, fighting for social justice, or making it more accessible for people to register to vote, Alex doesn’t just talk about the issues, he’s delivered on them.

It is critical that we get this ad in front of every person in Wisconsin to ensure our next leader in Congress represents hard-working Wisconsinites, not the corporate special interests.

body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Ud87Y0iP9YlVlm3iOEJnkGa-XnmoIDY6thQTJrQR8WWW4HPB6ACRGh1dX4bN5-dIyttWxQMYHQpeXQP1_rZWdaXO5q9f9rUwDLl6V4dDFLceFCjE8t8QHM28BYdNBM6Cfx8gP8j8LpXPlURIRdg_-r33JlAvaoV7hlX1N0RgHEO9e4_qA7Po3kspCULaBfsEItsBgHtjlq4_87ZnMMTSvNX2ORLy2Z0iXA_q7NrR7LQg6hJYSITjJt-4ND7Cd9f-jFgb5R74pU4TDEoeB-wXIrmkJ1MbQvTNwFsetL5RA84D5zx2_7dQwC8A7YQWdbhqLnajvECAkiMUeKswzThkw==&c=4c7T60jtGuEoJASsUA8bIRZT_huB8lnWoqtAKVesmMNwjbEV04A_ww==&ch=m-zHc1wq_Twtd1MUBHHHcCKt8K3TqNUWeA8y-BfUy9d5NP3oxKH1HQ==)

| Dear Fellow Patriot -
You probably know my husband Dan Crenshaw. He's in his second term as a Republican Congressman from Texas, representing the neighborhoods and communities around Houston.
Before Dan was elected to Congress, he served our country for ten years as a Navy SEAL. It was during Dan's SEAL training, referred to as BUD/S, that I met Dan.
While Dan was in BUD/S, I needed a challenge... a goal to work towards. So, I decided I would run a marathon.
After two months of preparation, race day arrived. Dan was excited to cheer me on and watch me meet this goal. At mile 19, he jumped on the course to run a few miles with me. Dan wanted the experience of us running the marathon together.
If you've ever run a marathon, you come to a point where you hit a mental wall, and your body shuts down. Mine came at mile 23. I could not take one more step, and I told Dan that I didn't think I could finish.
Dan said, "I am going to put my hand on your back and give you a slight push." It sounded strange, but at this point, I was willing to try anything. He did. My legs started moving, and I finished the race.
This is called a buddy push. In BUD/S, you are paired up with a buddy, and when you are not able to run one more step, your buddy gives you a push to keep you going.
That day, Dan was my buddy, and we've been a team supporting each other ever since.
When Dan was severely injured during his third deployment, I was by his side throughout his recovery, always there to give him a buddy push when needed.
During the long and exhausting days of our first campaign for Congress, Dan and I were there for each other, giving each other a buddy push along the way.
Now in Congress, I've seen Dan give his colleagues a buddy push when they are attacked by those that disagree with them.
Because Dan is vocal on the issues, challenges the status quo, and is building a conservative coalition to advance good policy, he's a target of those in power.
He'll tell you it doesn't bother him. Knowing him, it probably doesn't, but preparing for those attacks requires that he start early.
Campaigns cost millions of dollars to run, and if Dan is to have the resources necessary to prepare for those that oppose his leadership, he needs our help now.
So I've decided to give him a buddy push. This time for his campaign.
I committed to helping raise $125,000 for Dan's congressional campaign, and [your contribution of $5, $15, $35, $50, $100, or any amount you can afford will be a huge buddy push for Dan and the basis of a strong foundation for a winning campaign.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Ud87Y0iP9YlVlm3iOEJnkGa-XnmoIDY6thQTJrQR8WWW4HPB6ACRGh1dX4bN5-dIyttWxQMYHQpeXQP1_rZWdaXO5q9f9rUwDLl6V4dDFLceFCjE8t8QHM28BYdNBM6Cfx8gP8j8LpXPlURIRdg_-r33JlAvaoV7hlX1N0RgHEO9e4_qA7Po3kspCULaBfsEItsBgHtjlq4_87ZnMMTSvNX2ORLy2Z0iXA_q7NrR7LQg6hJYSITjJt-4ND7Cd9f-jFgb5R74pU4TDEoeB-wXIrmkJ1MbQvTNwFsetL5RA84D5zx2_7dQwC8A7YQWdbhRUEgBNTMd0e9Vaf2C2NOCQ==&c=4c7T60jtGuEoJASsUA8bIRZT_huB8lnWoqtAKVesmMNwjbEV04A_ww==&ch=m-zHc1wq_Twtd1MUBHHHcCKt8K3TqNUWeA8y-BfUy9d5NP3oxKH1HQ==)
---
| | | [Give Dan a Buddy Push](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Ud87Y0iP9YlVlm3iOEJnkGa-XnmoIDY6thQTJrQR8WWW4HPB6ACRGh1dX4bN5-dIyttWxQMYHQpeXQP1_rZWdaXO5q9f9rUwDLl6V4dDFLceFCjE8t8QHM28BYdNBM6Cfx8gP8j8LpXPlURIRdg_-r33JlAvaoV7hlX1N0RgHEO9e4_qA7Po3kspCULaBfsEItsBgHtjlq4_87ZnMMTSvNX2ORLy2Z0iXA_q7NrR7LQg6hJYSITjJt-4ND7Cd9f-jFgb5R74pU4TDEoeB-wXIrmkJ1MbQvTNwFsetL5RA84D5zx2_7dQwC8A7YQWdbhGLOMzYjPcneP3_OoHU9fGID0F0XVUklRmHwAvtReJU8=&c=4c7T60jtGuEoJASsUA8bIRZT_huB8lnWoqtAKVesmMNwjbEV04A_ww==&ch=m-zHc1wq_Twtd1MUBHHHcCKt8K3TqNUWeA8y-BfUy9d5NP3oxKH1HQ==)

Dan and I will be proud to have you on our team, and I will be so grateful when your help arrives.

| Sincerely,

| Tara Crenshaw

body:
Friends, we all knew that Scott Perry was a key player in pushing baseless claims about the 2020 election and helping to incite the Jan. 6th insurrection, but now it’s coming to light.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211007FR_N_TE_90DA_6_G_N

This is the most clear-cut example of abuse of power Scott Perry has ever committed, and we can’t let him get away with it. If you’re ready to kick Scott Perry out of office, rush in $20.22, or whatever you can give, now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211007FR_N_TE_90DA_6_G_N&amount=20.22]

If we let Scott Perry continue to hold public office, it will be an ugly stamp of approval for his tragic and dangerous actions. Without immediate action, he will continue selling out Pennsylvania through backroom deals and partisan scheming.

It’s up to all of us to make sure that 2022 will be the last time he ever holds public office -- elected or otherwise. Just imagine what he could do if we don’t act.

We can’t keep ignoring what’s going on here. It’s up to us to make it clear: Scott Perry will be unseated. Chip in $10 today to make it happen. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211007FR_N_TE_90DA_6_G_N]

Thank you,

Team Eugene

name: Ras Smith via RasForIowa.com
subject: My story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
I brought together members of law enforcement, Black Lives Matter, GOP leaders, and Governor Kim Reynolds herself. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37214242/310421822/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM2NmZlOC1iOTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgWmZ5Oy5IIElOkm6DMm0aFyKVOFVwLC4V4CTIma61g=)
Friend,

I'm going to tell you about how **Iowa became one of only three states nationwide to enact police reform legislation after George Floyd's murder,** and the role I played in it. Please take a moment to read this longer note, then consider [**chipping in $3 to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37214243/310421823/-73891749?refcode=em-10721-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM2NmZlOC1iOTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgWmZ5Oy5IIElOkm6DMm0aFyKVOFVwLC4V4CTIma61g=)

Five years ago, I was elected to the legislature not as a career politician, but because of my background in community building and activism. It's the main reason I've been able to get results in the GOP-controlled legislature, while others struggle.

Last summer, after the murder of George Floyd, many Americans who previously ignored racial injustice began to wake up to police brutality. As a legislator, chair of the legislative Black caucus, and an Iowan -- I got to work to make sure that another murder like George Floyd's didn't happen on our watch.

Instead of turning to the political elite and lobbyists, I went to the people first -- because I still believe that the true power lies with the people. That meant that before I brought our police reform bill -- **Plan for a More Perfect Union** \-- to the floor, I knew there was a movement building that couldn't be ignored. You see, there are times when you crawl through the legislative process and there are times when you have to sprint. Last spring, we were called to sprint.

I won't lie to you, friend, it wasn't easy. I was tasked with bringing together members of law enforcement, Black Lives Matter, GOP leaders, and Governor Kim Reynolds herself. Because that's what real democracy and leadership requires.

**It paid off. With a Republican trifecta in Iowa, we unanimously passed a law that bans chokeholds, holds officers of past misconduct accountable, and permits the Attorney General to investigate officer-involved shootings. And we were _one of only three states_ to do it.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37214244/310421824/-73891749?refcode=em-10721-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM2NmZlOC1iOTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgWmZ5Oy5IIElOkm6DMm0aFyKVOFVwLC4V4CTIma61g=)
_Taking a quiet moment following the vote._ (Photo credit: Iowa Starting Line)
Since then, Governor Kim Reynolds has worked tirelessly to undermine what we did. Rather than bring us together, she pitted Iowans against one another -- passing a bill that would allow people to run over protesters if they blocked traffic. That's the type of leadership she's shown, and it's why I knew I needed to run for governor.

[**Now that you've heard about the work we've done to create a more perfect union, will you chip in $3? Far-right Governor Kim Reynolds has to go, but we can't replace her with just any Democrat -- we need a champion of, by, and for the people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37214247/310421825/-73891749?refcode=em-10721-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM2NmZlOC1iOTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgWmZ5Oy5IIElOkm6DMm0aFyKVOFVwLC4V4CTIma61g=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37214249/310421829/-73891749?refcode=em-10721-all&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM2NmZlOC1iOTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgWmZ5Oy5IIElOkm6DMm0aFyKVOFVwLC4V4CTIma61g=)

| [Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37214264/310421846/-73891749?refcode=em-10721-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM2NmZlOC1iOTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgWmZ5Oy5IIElOkm6DMm0aFyKVOFVwLC4V4CTIma61g=)
---

As an Iowan who has spent time in many communities across the state -- from my family's farm in rural Iowa to my home in urban East Waterloo -- I have a unique understanding of what it's going to take to bring Iowans together to find solutions to our common struggles.

I know what it means to put the people first, and that's what I'll do as Iowa's next Governor.

Thanks,

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

name: Alex Padilla
subject: The West Coast Ocean Protection Act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It’s incredibly important that we ban oil drilling off the shore of California
#

Earlier this week, my team sent out a survey asking you to let us know which issues are most important to you.
Also earlier this week, a State of Emergency was declared in Orange County as thousands of gallons of crude oil leaked into the Pacific Ocean.
So it should come as no surprise that a majority — _78%!_ — of people who responded to our survey told us that addressing climate change was one of their top priorities.
So I wanted to reach out to you today to tell you about a bill I’m cosponsoring in the Senate, and to ask for your help in urging my colleagues to include it in the reconciliation bill.
**The West Coast Ocean Protection Act** will ban new offshore oil drilling off the coast of California. As this most recent spill demonstrates, we need to end offshore oil drilling immediately, both because of the environmental harm and economic impact that disasters like this have.
[**Please add your name and say you support the West Coast Ocean Protection Act and believe it should be included in the reconciliation bill.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/West-Coast-Ocean-Protection-Act?source=em211007-1-15&refcode2=381.159979.sM9sA0&t=1&akid=381%2E159979%2EsM9sA0)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/West-Coast-Ocean-Protection-Act?source=em211007-1-15&refcode2=381.159979.sM9sA0&t=2&akid=381%2E159979%2EsM9sA0)**
This most recent oil spill is also a reminder of the consequences of not weaning ourselves off of our dependency on fossil fuels. Tackling climate change requires we move away from crude oil and toward more sustainable sources of energy like wind and solar power _right now_ , not just years into the future.
It’s incredibly important for the future of our environment that we ban new oil drilling off the shore of California, so I am asking for your help to demonstrate support for this crucial legislation and push for its inclusion in the reconciliation bill:
[**Please add your name and say you support the West Coast Ocean Protection Act and believe it should be included in the reconciliation bill. This is important, so thank you in advance for making your voice heard.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/West-Coast-Ocean-Protection-Act?source=em211007-1-15&refcode2=381.159979.sM9sA0&t=3&akid=381%2E159979%2EsM9sA0)
Thank you for standing strong and taking action in the fight against climate change.
— Alex Padilla
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/West-Coast-Ocean-Protection-Act?source=em211007-1-15&refcode2=381.159979.sM9sA0&t=4&akid=381%2E159979%2EsM9sA0)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=381%2E159979%2EsM9sA0)

subject: ⚠️ ACTION NEEDED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, It’s time for Biden’s DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to resign. Over the past 8 months, we’ve seen Mayorkas LIE repeatedly about the border. Mayorkas lied about: ❌ Needing mass amnesty ❌ Saying that we’re not seeing a “flood” of migrants ❌ Not needing the wall to keep Americans safe It’s clear that Mayorkas is completely ignorant about the realities on our border. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: It all makes sense now
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3bbd4ccf2bb6/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4972546?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
I’m sure you have witnessed the complete disarray of the Democratic party the past couple weeks. They can’t agree, they can’t get anything done, they can’t run our country.

The only thing they agree on is you deserve to have your taxes hiked to pay for their socialist agenda.

This week makes it clear - the Democratic party is a train wreck from top to bottom. It’s not shocking our nation is faced with multiple crises right now.... Democrats can’t even get their own house in order - how could we possibly trust them to run an entire nation.

They handed Afghanistan over to terrorists. They’ve turned their back on Israel. They’ve left our southern border WIDE open. They’ve let prices for food and gas rise for your family.

They only care about power, and it's a scary thing in their hands. So, what are we going to do about it?

Well, it starts now. Over the next year, we have to speak up and confront them about every crisis they’ve caused. We need to hold Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, Ilhan Omar, Antony Blinken, and more accountable. I would put Kamala Harris on that list - but we need to find her first.

We need to expose their awful policies and their socialist plans. You have seen the damage, and I am actively working in Congress to stop it. Together, we are going to make sure everyone knows the danger of one-party rule and end it in 2022.

When we take back the House, and when we have the Majority, we will get our nation back on track. We can hold the line of Biden’s radical spending. We can put in needed protections for our constitutional rights that Democrats are intent on destroying. And we can restore our nation’s reputation that Biden has destroyed.

**It all makes sense now - Democrats clearly aren't fit to run their own party - they aren't fit to run our country. **

We have a lot of work to do, and failure is not an option. I’m just getting started, and Republicans are gearing up for the fight to save our nation. Now it's time to go all-in - Are you with us?

---

I’m sure you’re busy, so I’ll make this brief.

**We can flip this MAGA Republican held seat,_and here’s why:_**

clean_body: I won’t stop telling the American people the truth. | Peter, Once again, the left-wing media is trying to slander and attack me for telling the TRUTH... For the last 40 YEARS, the 19 bellwether counties across America have ALL voted for the winning presidential candidate -- except in 2020. That’s why I’ve supported a full forensic audit of the 2020 election in key battleground states like Arizona all year long. If we can’t ensure our elections are free and fair as we fight to win this open Senate seat, then our mission to FLIP Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority is already over. Liberals in the Fake News Media and the establishment RINOs who attack me want you to believe that securing our elections is for conspiracy theorists. But basic statistics is far from a conspiracy. The mainstream media can’t stand that we’ve called them out on their lies. That’s why even after Arizona’s audit showed serious inconsistencies and a need to decertify the results, these radicals in the media only doubled down on their attacks against me. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84mWSX5s_gWiknEMzexWKtQ7-kB2Kp2sO_gg01SN2RHbPcBFegYtyNR4j5fqa2AEnOMmzfwubyl8Svy2qk4J3Mlr_OLfFGL8NxnxjsXS_y47RIGHcyC39kl9ZXa4LJbWV8rRFUcdYuoCz6DmW35UNV_fblTgpDmb2hh_g0AWUC8MDnfq6JBCjLhZnUsPZfEYjSnfQW18BHBJGcaxEH0kjWmWLs3azrnXMs0006wB_xBNNzW4oGaVaqtX2nwH35phKBIfcLrArYRhkInVgaGBs-xuXvsTO5vdqP7ne5POXQ5fBWBioVrT8NLHu4qF6cDZsJupO28mJLJ3xRb1KHSm3ZzVkNNBFxMWha4zTQziBhsvKu7TMchcA89uT5JnKnQFGYA/3fy/spgI_QsvTpS4HiXMGoeteg/h0/XnwkpzIZJ-OnKs3Kkuml0IsQ6m2SW3HE1_nRmMB-bZY)
Derek -- Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand:

**FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats.

**THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a _sweeping_ voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0."

**NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights -- and _CNN_ confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection.

With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's _first ever_ Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights -- but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.

clean_body: If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | Derek -- Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand: FIRST: Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats. THEN: Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a sweeping voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0." NOW: Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights -- and CNN confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights -- but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. Thanks for being a part of this team. \-- Raphael Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . body:
Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t |

**"NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT"**

Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for.

Both are false.

Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany.

Democrats will go to great lengths to control our personal lives. In a recent interview, Dr. Anthony Fauci said “there comes a time when you have to Friend, Democrats will go to great lengths to control our personal lives. In a recent interview, Dr. Anthony Fauci said “there comes a time when you have to give up what you consider your individual right of making your own decision for the greater good of society.” Essentially suggesting that we should be giving up our basic rights as Americans at the whim of Big Government. I was elected to Congress to represent your conservative values and to protect your individual freedoms. These vaccine mandates by the Biden administration are unconstitutional and their shutdowns have hurt our small businesses and many middle-class Americans.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8871%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2ql0KUV9SXLyFJKvQpNPQA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15868%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z6FPmTc13fkNxh8yxJE4TA&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15869%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2SVuLBPaC1frKrybZ7b36g&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15868%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z6FPmTc13fkNxh8yxJE4TA&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15860%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rl942hLV%2btMemZUFwk8RZg&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15861%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bJynO34IfO6An6JQbVoj1A&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15862%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t247B06Zz%2bHtOqoFw9hwsw&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8871%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2ql0KUV9SXLyFJKvQpNPQA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8871%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2ql0KUV9SXLyFJKvQpNPQA&sysid=1)

subject: Protecting our majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www

| | We’ll be blunt folks — even if Terry McAuliffe becomes Governor, he won’t be able to make the progress Virginia needs with right wing Republicans serving as a roadblock in the House of Delegates. **It’s crucial we send a Democratic majority back to Richmond. That’s why we’re asking:** **[Can we count on you to chip in $25 to help us protect the progress our Democratic House and Senate have made over the last few years so we can hit the ground running in January and get to work making real change that’s going to benefit hard-working Virginians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37217623/310431951/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211007-house&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdiZDA1Zi1jNDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PBZo3WeXoqzfV2Fde7S9nt-9ctmirzOxXURpe0G6Cw8=)** If Glenn Youngkin takes the Governor’s office, his fellow GOP extremists will take the legislature and begin rolling back all of the progress Democrats have made over the last few years. It’s critical that we’re supporting candidates up and down the ballot across the Commonwealth — from Abingdon to Arlington to Accomack — because politics is a team sport. Terry is going to need all of the help he can get in the House and Senate to fight for the issues that matter to Virginians. **[So, Derek, with only 26 days left until Election Day, can we count on you to join our team and chip in to help elect Democrats across the Commonwealth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37217624/310431952/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211007-house&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdiZDA1Zi1jNDI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PBZo3WeXoqzfV2Fde7S9nt-9ctmirzOxXURpe0G6Cw8=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[**Send in your predictions**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=517c42a88e5c4fb9a34deb571f191059&_e=5pdD2Ld2Rgj5Fac8Cqb3vaIWvD4pW9H2j_Jku0ib78g2xgrDnD9NdBFk2gU8beDU1MkPXD3R1XIkMkle-ZMqPTZj-2CwCEGqz3UMPKkc9ILkYbPPZjcdDNP2M_K-gl1UVzl-QzfQhvaPbCTG5H-A8LR8WyfP0XpsMVHkxKkuX8ZjIFrmV6Ck_veGtjc2DvN2Oi8TjzZ35aMLbYD_p8yWF3EYX61tutHITDD98QovEE8VUQQEyp6oNqzMbsAxOKawsGIgA-N3yaDMTbCiXh6jNhry0UAXP2lwvlrfG_P9wk39zGMfz2CSMnGKw29MofLKgX6fPkRQRniZVOx1QKzE_D2HjD7EXV3hfHe-1-cyxGiYYwmorErx9Y8SSXCmWSEFSQnHuo9whDW-49NLvhUj0KJkkmQN3NseAFfQ6sUap71qE9cpAl98ozL3aUzaHPh3RwgzhqH6iTMN7TIafxDOiQ%3D%3D) Alabama means a lot to me, as I got to represent my home state on the field against the baddest guys in football. As a former team captain for the Crimson Tide, I know what toughness looks like on and off the field. Peter, I am ecstatic that I can team up with my friend, former Auburn player Bret Eddins, and proudly say that WEEKLY Score Pick’Em Contest is back. Here’s how to play: **With a minimum donation of $25 you can send in your prediction of the final scores for both the Alabama and Auburn games each week. We will subtract the prediction from each game with the actual final score and then add the scores together from both games. clean_body: Peter, Saturdays are meant for rooting for your FAVORITE football team and as a former player, I loved going out every game day and battling it out for four quarters. Alabama means a lot to me, as I got to represent my home state on the field against the baddest guys in football. As a former team captain for the Crimson Tide, I know what toughness looks like on and off the field. Peter, I am ecstatic that I can team up with my friend, former Auburn player Bret Eddins, and proudly say that WEEKLY Score Pick’Em Contest is back. Here’s how to play: With a minimum donation of $25 you can send in your prediction of the final scores for both the Alabama and Auburn games each week. We will subtract the prediction from each game with the actual final score and then add the scores together from both games. The person with the lowest total score WINS! 🏈 This week’s winner will receive a football signed 🏈 by me and Bret Eddins and a $50 gift card to Baumhower’s Victory Grille. This Week’s Games: Alabama VS Texas A &M Auburn VS Georgia Pick-em is NOW open and will close at 2pm CST on Saturday. It’s time to get up and cheer for your favorite team, Peter. Your donations will go straightto Katie’s campaign to put Alabama First! Thank you, Wesley Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our response to Manchin: No.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, we can hardly believe it:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211007?refcode=em20211007-703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=703_420207_i0PMDN&akid=703%2E420207%2Ei0PMDN)
Instead of joining us in supporting President Biden’s entire Build Back Better agenda that is wildly popular across America, Senator Joe Manchin is telling progressives they should “pick just one” of our priorities that working families want, need, and deserve — from an expanded child tax credit, paid leave, and child care to health care, pre-k, and affordable housing.
In other words, Senator Manchin is telling working families they deserve _just one_ of the things they need to thrive.
**We refuse to leave working people, families, and our communities behind.** When voters handed Democrats the White House, the Senate, and the House, they did not do so on the condition that we’d have to choose between providing health care OR child care, paid leave OR housing, climate action OR education.
**Peter, these are all necessary and popular priorities — and it’s time to make real investments into each and every one of them so we finally deliver transformational change to people across America.**[**If you’re still with Pramila in this fight, can you donate $3 today to help her hold the line? Any amount makes a difference when we’re pushing back against the corporate interests trying to sink our progress:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211007?refcode=em20211007-703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=703_420207_i0PMDN&akid=703%2E420207%2Ei0PMDN)
**[Donate $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211007?refcode=em20211007-703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=703_420207_i0PMDN&akid=703%2E420207%2Ei0PMDN)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

Youngkin’s a GOP extremist -- he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump FIVE times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. subject: 𝐌𝐀𝐆𝐀 𝐊𝐞𝐧 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐭 is *already* running ads!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P

Steve needs the support of this grassroots coalition because we know that all **FIVE** of his Republican opponents will see this new rating as a sign of weakness.

clean_body: our race just got TOUGHER | | | | | Team -- this is serious: One of the most accurate political reports in the country just shifted Nevada’s gubernatorial race from “likely” to “lean Democrat." After reviewing recent polls, Cook Political Report feels that Steve is losing his advantage in this race for Battleground Nevada. This updated rating is tightening the race even more -- and we’re worried that if this trend continues, Steve could lose this seat. ****Folks, everything is on the line right now. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Remember, Steve won the last election by just four points \-- so this updated rating from the Cook Political Report shows that in the upcoming election,that margin could be even smaller. Steve needs the support of this grassroots coalition because we know that all FIVE of his Republican opponents will see this new rating as a sign of weakness. If we want to Keep Nevada Blue and protect all of the progressive accomplishments Steve has made, we have to act NOW. We need to do whatever it takes to turn the tide on this downward trend and ensure Gov. Sisolak is re-elected.** | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for reading this urgent message. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37219318/310435954/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY4ZjFhYi1jYTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2X_NPupiLmzZrseJpOV0DYb8AHFeY9r8bIMj6IiIPs=)
Hey folks — it’s Senator Martin Heinrich. **[I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll split a donation between my friend Michael Bennet and my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37219320/310435957/1824394237?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211007_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY4ZjFhYi1jYTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2X_NPupiLmzZrseJpOV0DYb8AHFeY9r8bIMj6IiIPs=)** But first, let me explain why his race in Colorado is so important. From day one, Michael has championed policies that put people, families, and our environment first. We have worked together to protect our treasured public lands, deliver relief to families with the expanded Child Tax Credit, and bring forward a bill to ensure that all Tribal communities have access to clean water. **Michael’s work is grounded in what folks across Colorado, New Mexico, and our country care about most.** That’s why Republicans have made him a top target in their fight to take back the Senate majority. In August alone, Senate Republicans raised _$8 million_ — breaking their own fundraising records. Frankly, that’s a _lot_ of money. _[**Michael refuses to accept corporate PAC money because he works for the people of Colorado, not corporate special interests, so we need a strong grassroots team to overcome Republican attacks. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37219322/310435959/1824394237?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211007_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY4ZjFhYi1jYTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2X_NPupiLmzZrseJpOV0DYb8AHFeY9r8bIMj6IiIPs=)_ But we can’t back down in the face of the GOP’s massive war chest. Michael’s voice and our majority are too important. **Time after time, folks like you have chipped in to Michael’s campaign to prove that grassroots dollars add up and make a real difference. Will you show your support again by splitting a donation between our campaigns to keep Michael’s seat blue and protect our majority? The attacks against Michael are picking up speed so we need all hands on deck.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37219324/310435961/1824394237?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211007_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY4ZjFhYi1jYTI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2X_NPupiLmzZrseJpOV0DYb8AHFeY9r8bIMj6IiIPs=)**

clean_body: | = Hey folks — it’s Senator Martin Heinrich. = But first, let me explain why his race in Colorado is so important. From day one, Michael has championed policies that put people, families, and our environment first. We have worked together to protect our treasured public lands, deliver relief to families with the expanded Child Tax Credit, and bring forward a bill to ensure that all Tribal communities have access to clean water. Michael’s work is grounded in what folks across Colorado, New Mexico, and our country care about most. That’s why Republicans have made him a top target in their fight to take back the Senate majority. In August alone, Senate Republicans raised $8 million — breaking their own fundraising records. Frankly, that’s a lot of money. = But we can’t back down in the face of the GOP’s massive war chest. Michael’s voice and our majority are too important. Time after time, folks like you have chipped in to Michael’s campaign to prove that grassroots dollars add up and make a real difference. Will you show your support again by splitting a donation between our campaigns to keep Michael’s seat blue and protect our majority? The attacks against Michael are picking up speed so we need all hands on deck. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for chipping in any amount you can. It’s up to us to defend our Senate majority and keep up our fight for an America that works for everyone. — Martin Senator Martin Heinrich New Mexico Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

We are so infuriated Derek - Politically charged criminal complaints have been lodged against one of our Progressive candidates, Bridgette Craighead. Racist notes have been sent her way telling her to stop running, just because she wants to better her community for our future. Bridgette was charged with two counts of misdemeanor speaking abusive language to another. The charges stem from an unfounded affidavit filed by a citizen. _**Not only was the affidavit inaccurate, it wasn 't even investigated by law enforcement. **_ No one, candidate or not, should ever be faced with charges without a proper investigation. Right now, that's what's happening to Bridgette. She's made sacrifices by standing up for what she believes in. And because she is an outspoken Black woman, people are trying to silence her. [We can't let that stand.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zheGAulCRvkT5FEfXnlmIlYZFww98d75pCsNXEf2WaFwa0HX4TVg6HTkiY6YVtrzF9BI4x1ZwFyWFH3xQF2pbuJ1Z34lIZPWbmtwqG7XioiQYwR9VgZDguoErIbGCnHHqlYarGcfgMtdmC0Jpo1Piebd7gswhH-oUSL-I0k62P8MB5nTk1GD4VL3v3Ov41wii35Fx3aMVYFiRN3RlU3lqilJfgKdUtpAj72TQU9C3OmLCrzrc7JOt_WSi2ktlzxJWG-na_ijhrf6H0g4fbBYlBAHibWBFdNBUTG_IuqE47M85Cyck3WytOsLbIgnDEb4hrUEW0XwWiIv6GwmIR6NgC6-ft9UmaM70WRSxnU5EQ_AHDUrhqmgnnCsGHJ1NhRi0X0BK1HhkQdNXjd82rNFnI/3fy/x1s9mjjJRHWPTqsFMFcGDA/h1/Y2srC34Z4jZccAAFoFt4T653HMgL8VRGftOmAi15bBo)

We are in complete solidarity with Bridgette and her campaign. We firmly believe that the politically motivated charges against Bridgette are unfounded and her voice should be heard. Our Justice system does not work for Black Women and we will not sit by while it's used to silence her. Black Women must be heard, not silenced. As Bridgette's campaign often says, this race is a movement, not a moment. We know Bridgette's message resonates well beyond the boundaries of House District 9. Let's come out strong and support her. She stepped up for us. Let's step up for her. [Can you help us support Bridgette today by contributing $5, $25, or more right now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zheGAulCRvkT5FEfXnlmIlYZFww98d75pCsNXEf2WaFwa0HX4TVg6HTkiY6YVtrzE5ASeoDxecHInywJ12GZi2tN9pc8n2JCxG6u3eH4jLJfU0HhlMmHmxQ9zw1kXNpCjMadJwd5MNm8soAs66VoTMLtnlEUxdNWolMemRncNRB-jOpx22WYbfVDw9lvgkuLDDBD8ypExIZKGQcXLVbxEyfDj3QuF7ut2vLPwUa2AgYkXhdELoRAwtsrHldMUfR_amFxd5ivpYaq6XcGOKaCb4-pA_CrgoRN--cjZnn58B1Qn8U0n8zOapvGHBNqovZDWIyYpT4sq-4cYxBvr77zSHQuMdqubzLOIQSW4fBiTsZVoQkwsmIxhxII-oDUEBlX619ONyusce-NgAnFvsMQQh/3fy/x1s9mjjJRHWPTqsFMFcGDA/h3/ja5acnH17RgwQR6RrPsoB0DPKROPo0YH-X88_cJtOmk) In solidarity, KTBBH PAC

clean_body: | | We are so infuriated Derek - Politically charged criminal complaints have been lodged against one of our Progressive candidates, Bridgette Craighead. Racist notes have been sent her way telling her to stop running, just because she wants to better her community for our future. Bridgette was charged with two counts of misdemeanor speaking abusive language to another. The charges stem from an unfounded affidavit filed by a citizen. Not only was the affidavit inaccurate, it wasn 't even investigated by law enforcement. No one, candidate or not, should ever be faced with charges without a proper investigation. Right now, that's what's happening to Bridgette. She's made sacrifices by standing up for what she believes in. And because she is an outspoken Black woman, people are trying to silence her. | We are in complete solidarity with Bridgette and her campaign. We firmly believe that the politically motivated charges against Bridgette are unfounded and her voice should be heard. Our Justice system does not work for Black Women and we will not sit by while it's used to silence her. Black Women must be heard, not silenced. As Bridgette's campaign often says, this race is a movement, not a moment. We know Bridgette's message resonates well beyond the boundaries of House District 9. Let's come out strong and support her. She stepped up for us. Let's step up for her. In solidarity, KTBBH PAC | | KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." That's what Progressives need to do now in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people. body:

Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=acfacc54c8b946cd8d6a409d746ec28a&_e=0ncZ5ByiQusA5ak0oWeRhe0iGPPU8QNMJTGjBUdbFca0ovTikq-2fulNjgQa6XeL23DzCE9FNoixJL4GSKNG9ouvQ0fWqmQ2GDpQUF9gF7MSSH4E8GXrTcLDEnWm6nLiF7w_9tKAVDrC0_idY8uYDqeJndqHsS8x0LQbR1eu0vOe5wEntNcV7TUmRe1JSp9i8WnpI0prGn87NX7ikevxhGMkPPraXQV3nJLkOhjyEn1rNNgkaqNEwfrw2jLYTOjahGzV7o4NEE9kYV5VuuER06Y7-yIIReAllb1DOfWMHV081Kb8kwZRB9h8iwcz6PIGWbe-lY2FeLUEBl7w3H0XczfsA7lrP3GXB6NVuvicUQGS4RaThY3TbRrWZ5eaYYxhRnV1SRd76GeQbSpl2ymEIXvCzvIDfJvlceHdLNNhR6z5d3iQJ2IGJfQyBD2miUWrT178KsJtAARrYREQcatVYvy4F2bC__oK7gpNiKxmx5s%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

name: Tevin
subject: Let’s talk about worker protections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1081%2E3611125%2Enh9FHS ][IMG]

Hey there folks,

It’s Tevin -- Digital Communications Director for Team Ryan.

Did you hear our campaign made history last week? We are the first U.S.
Senate campaign in Ohio history to unionize!

After organizing with IBEW Local 1466, we were voluntarily recognized. And
I couldn’t be prouder to be part of this union.

This campaign is all about cutting workers in on the deal, and our team is
proof that Tim practices what he preaches. He’ll fight for protections for
all workers and ensure their voices are heard, just like he does with our
campaign.

Campaigns are notorious for their long hours and demanding schedules, but
even before we unionized, Tim made sure our team was treated fairly.

Tim has a long record of fighting for Ohio workers. He grew up in a union
family and knows that workers are better off when they’re able to
collectively bargain for fair wages and good working conditions.

Folks, we think we can all agree that it's essential to cut workers in on
the deal. But we can only do that by expanding our Democratic majority.
And right now our majority is razor thin -- if the Republicans flip a
single seat, it’s all over.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5032?t=1007&akid=1081%2E3611125%2Enh9FHS ]Can we count on you to chip in so we can expand our majority and get to
work for ALL Ohio workers? With Republicans funneling money into this
race, every dollar counts.

This campaign is all about cutting workers in on the deal, and our team is proof that Tim practices what he preaches. He’ll fight for protections for all workers and ensure their voices are heard, just like he does with our campaign. body:
Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t |

**"NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT"**

Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for.

Both are false.

Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany.

**[Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56278de84bac416c8767d5d02087739b&_e=MBodbpvuLMe9auJAdDlaHGiXoJoxWMCztiM42DlZEktJl6er--cZapEGoplyfMX1M_HK767F8K5Rly7xx7RUOictMpH1vxxb8gDnzjpNQb8VGkwoyophSaAw8eyGh19lu06vU-JWBaAZ8-7XqBIIaS8GHq6HjNkBn_-q7Ct58bM4i-k01Ys1vdchwSKR_9N2IGxjA7UwD7FWZ0or12-3KUsgNZ8ZQ0R56C3CuNItIkRIt9NNMKTEuIEisGhCt2-SanHpue9pkYYRZw3x12Ezg_51wBoUIcRyNLFdxaAOvXYyAG5I-VpbhmrN3JuLi85Mc04ur-QdDnQHidGlFbmlzj5oamp1ekul16Go9YyVIyxGh1qDynmvytmUx227lgSDgQURq7nS0mXG1MtCxRvF72UnHXDSHb87WAMLAcWmQ6C6FBL5_ZIxRP24zjfpZ8cZcTfdMNInD47joNrlxGTqW3CO6bOIm9maGKTdjbAXQwk%3D)**
* Germany: 49%
* Sweden: 43%
* France: 47%

Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?

[** LET US KNOW TODAY->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56278de84bac416c8767d5d02087739b&_e=MBodbpvuLMe9auJAdDlaHGiXoJoxWMCztiM42DlZEktJl6er--cZapEGoplyfMX1M_HK767F8K5Rly7xx7RUOictMpH1vxxb8gDnzjpNQb8VGkwoyophSaAw8eyGh19lu06vU-JWBaAZ8-7XqBIIaS8GHq6HjNkBn_-q7Ct58bM4i-k01Ys1vdchwSKR_9N2IGxjA7UwD7FWZ0or12-3KUsgNZ8ZQ0R56C3CuNItIkRIt9NNMKTEuIEisGhCt2-SanHpue9pkYYRZw3x12Ezg84UixfcTT0NmDsZczvaIxN6uGvyThFysO-9b6KnuLRrtA9Vv0-TV5vYMPukoysOGDEZ1ofVVklICqRB-kpFjPB5Up4C5hwyUr_fU6xu3UfykloyDyzc2rfXnrIPeYPcXuvrKYFYmnwjcBvsreesRfdqUUKM_Q9dB8Y4C1epWwi-s1xjYYI8-uIFNEsTwDyTBFTlb67pIXjxuOETXIssg2Y%3D)
Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America?

Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline.

**[We want to know where you stand. Do you support the government playing a larger role in your everyday life through increased welfare programs- paid for by increasing your tax bill?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56278de84bac416c8767d5d02087739b&_e=MBodbpvuLMe9auJAdDlaHGiXoJoxWMCztiM42DlZEktJl6er--cZapEGoplyfMX1M_HK767F8K5Rly7xx7RUOictMpH1vxxb8gDnzjpNQb8VGkwoyophSaAw8eyGh19lu06vU-JWBaAZ8-7XqBIIaS8GHq6HjNkBn_-q7Ct58bM4i-k01Ys1vdchwSKR_9N2IGxjA7UwD7FWZ0or12-3KUsgNZ8ZQ0R56C3CuNItIkRIt9NNMKTEuIEisGhCt2-SanHpue9pkYYRZw3x12Ezg4a7gU8cMWPDeePpVJlpoJd1mMwB_lTPY9MWE6V8TnqDimvOEhnQiZABs96ME08X0CVXzF8JPJx8pLalPvrgiLLXi3a42UaETxpNgivgS2ReBgjuyAbDkIDEG6CzhcXplfXJG8Vmlj9BWeoMMJWaJGRF6RblaLjTiNPKf7Q7LXzOjQ-Hed1xbI82LfGlSUyeIIFyvlE_Wdv_eQhBgxAV8xs%3D)**

clean_body: Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t | "NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT" Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for. Both are false. Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany. Germany: 49% Sweden: 43% France: 47% Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state? Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America? Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline. ** Thanks, NRSC HQ If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. clean_body: In a word? Everything. | Peter, In next year’s Midterm Elections, the fate of the nation will be decided in Missouri. There, voters will choose between a far-left Socialist Democrat or a true Republican Patriot. And whichever party wins that “open” Senate seat will surely win the Majority. The Democrats’ plan for America is just awful, Peter. They want to RAISE your taxes, STRIP your Constitutional rights, PACK the courts, and OPEN our borders to unchecked illegal immigration. They want to END America as we know it. If the Left wins Missouri’s “open” Senate seat, they’ll have the votes they need to make this plan a reality. That’s why we need to stop them, together. | Missouri Victory Fund EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0119683 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | Thank you. name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Terry McAuliffe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The polls are showing this race *wayyyyy* too close for comfort just three weeks out.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211007-2927-header&t=1&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)
I've got a bit of a unique request for yinz today, Peter.
[**_Today, I am personally asking you to split a $10 donation between my campaign and Terry McAuliffe's (D) campaign for Governor of Virginia._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211007-2927&t=2&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)
Here's why I'm asking:
The Virginia governor's election is now just over three weeks away, and it's been rated as a **Toss Up** by _the Cook Political Report_ (just like our race here in PA)!
The choice is stark. On one hand there's Terry McAuliffe, a Democrat who's proven his ability to deliver real, bold progress to working people across their Commonwealth. And on the GOP side, there's a far-right Trump-backed ultra-millionaire who wants to restrict abortion access, is a lifetime member of the NRA, and who'd take a sledgehammer to our sacred right to vote.
To you + me, Peter, this decision might be a no-brainer. **Yet recent polls have shown the race locked in a statistical tie — and polls could get *even tighter* in these final, crucial weeks.** That's why I'm asking you to join me in throwing your support behind Democrat Terry McAuliffe as he fights to prevent another Trump 2.0 from winning this critical governorship in just over three weeks.
[**_If it makes sense for your budget, would you take this important opportunity to split a $10 donation between Terry McAuliffe's race for Virginia Governor and our campaign? The polls are showing this race as neck and neck, so I'm really hoping you'll join me in fighting to hold this governorship. You can use this link._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211007-2927&t=3&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211007-2927&t=22&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)**
As Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania, I have a front row seat to the kinds of really big decisions that get made by a governor every single day.
That is exactly why I can tell you — without ANY exaggeration — that letting a Donald Trump-endorsed Republican win this race would be detrimental to the working families of Virginia, and could pose a critical threat to the progress Dems have fought for to gain more governorships nationwide.
The polls are showing this race _wayyyyy_ too close for comfort just three weeks out, Peter, so I'm coming to you to ask:
[**_Will you use this link to make a split contribution to Terry McAuliffe's campaign to keep Virginia blue + our campaign here in PA? Any amount would make a huge impact, so I'd be deeply grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211007-2927&t=23&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211007-2927-footer&t=24&refcode2=2927_434096_KPkEhI&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2927%2E434096%2EKPkEhI)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: Join Mike for an afternoon with California leaders Working With Progressive Leaders in California We're working alongside some of the brightest and bravest leaders here at home. Friend, Hope your week is going well! Thanks for reading Mike's campaign updates. This week has been amazing - Mike has met some of the progressive leaders in Southern California - and they've asked him to speak at a candidate forum this Saturday, Oct. 9th at 4PM PDT. We hope you can join us for an afternoon of some great discussion on how we're going to deliver for working people in our districts. = Let me know if you have any questions. Thanks for your support thus far! See you Saturday! -Alex Coronado Campaign Manager for = = | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend,
**This is disgusting and offensive!**
Liberal Lisa Murkowski, who got appointed to her U.S. Senate seat by her dad 20 years ago, just filed paperwork for re-election as a _**Republican.**_
She is actively defying the Republican Party--she was officially censured by the Alaska Republican Party and is _prohibited_ from running as a Republican! She also thinks she can deceive Alaskans once again, even though she cozied up to her buddy, Joe Biden, and worked tirelessly to derail President Trump at every single turn. _She even voted for Impeachment!_ She doesn’t have your best interests at heart...She’s too worried about her D.C.-Insider and dark-money friends.
This is why President Trump **FULLY ENDORSED** Kelly Tshibaka to be Alaska's next U.S. Senator!
He knows that Kelly is a __**true**__ Republican, an America First Conservative and has you and your family’s best interests in mind.
**KELLY WILL ALWAYS FIGHT FOR ALASKA AND AMERICA**
But she can’t fight alone! She needs our support immediately.

She also thinks she can deceive Alaskans once again, even though she cozied up to her buddy, Joe Biden, and worked tirelessly to derail President Trump at every single turn. She even voted for Impeachment! She doesn’t have your best interests at heart...She’s too worried about her D.C.-Insider and dark-money friends. This is why President Trump FULLY ENDORSED Kelly Tshibaka to be Alaska's next U.S. Senator! He knows that Kelly is a true Republican, an America First Conservative and has you and your family’s best interests in mind. KELLY WILL ALWAYS FIGHT FOR ALASKA AND AMERICA But she can’t fight alone! She needs our support immediately. If we don’t stop Liberal Lisa right now, who knows what she might do to hurt Alaska next! Thank you, Team Kelly | | | | ==

Fellow American,
