Apparently, President Biden's "Border Czar," VP Kamala Harris, _is more concerned about the immigrants illegally attempting to enter our country than our overworked and underappreciated American Border Patrol agents._

While Harris is "deeply troubled" about Border Patrol agents on horseback who are trying to prevent immigrants from illegally entering our country, like most Americans, **_I am deeply troubled_** by the fact that we have thousands of immigrants rushing our border daily **(with an estimated 50,000 more en route)** , taxing the system, and making life hell on Earth for the Border Patrol and the people of the Rio Grande Valley.

Fellow American, _on multiple occasions_ , I have called for Senate hearings about what is going on at our southern border, but unfortunately, we can't get Democrats to hold such important hearings.

| [** Tell Democrats – FIX OUR SOUTHERN BORDER! **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d3b56f04384e49f0bac1d6e303c5ddfb&_e=DtFqB17RTC54HVXHmeJjbIA3OXNfixS-TE8XFmX2-p8PST9uMrASiXPtnmYFXhoQJl4FfnIXzBxc_aNjaxpdYxzpGMGO24d-l17LXqw-h-nT9m3WQgvDn9YK5KxGViPnF5n1O2qQ5JI9go_1KBoQ4JhwiLhLPp5YkHSUC8d3h8t6DDpfJqL7v47U8I_SydC6cYoUiRVl7a2Ljkw0AHYElST1gtNCFD_Lsgq4gaBB3VKXqUJPh7LCxaS-hw5HWAGUy-EHGDjIwoglWJgfQjASwM5ahZ4NAX43NYEOKWHdVb9IGkEH9oyDw5KkH0Dm_sYBtKvFDpkkTtOhfW-_XVROdIxD-g0BHP7R0W2e25NGbT_LS3oBflvN3yDkovCh-1NyPV6eqDoc2OQf9ZOVHtl7Ha-fBrTtsjvm6MPQ7M3R-aJXzES2C7xKGM5HcLMy82RPzvvHlL6zUFDIhOHwU2ydAgmzGKtgK-CgQ1s0Yfq8uLq5ZCCYJDZNcEt-7Dob49x05f3WqhvqvQYGE3sbA7lK3sAXLGpT6PWGhzo4_SvSs-YM_FE7zK7B364j5ePZ7mfi)

Whether they're in the White House or here on Capitol Hill, Democrats continue to turn a blind eye to - _or actively encourage_ - the endless stream of illegals, not just from Mexico and Central America, but the Caribbean, Africa, and even the Middle East.

Fellow American, that's why I am counting on folks like you to send a strong message to Democrats in Washington - _**[it's time to address and fix the crisis at our southern border!](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d3b56f04384e49f0bac1d6e303c5ddfb&_e=DtFqB17RTC54HVXHmeJjbIA3OXNfixS-TE8XFmX2-p8PST9uMrASiXPtnmYFXhoQJl4FfnIXzBxc_aNjaxpdYxzpGMGO24d-l17LXqw-h-nT9m3WQgvDn9YK5KxGViPnF5n1O2qQ5JI9go_1KBoQ4JhwiLhLPp5YkHSUC8d3h8t6DDpfJqL7v47U8I_SydC6cYoUiRVl7a2Ljkw0AHYElST1gtNCFD_Lsgq4gaBB3VKXqUJPh7LCxaS-hw5HWAGUy-EHGDjIwoglWJgfQjASwM5ahZ4NAX43NYEOKWHdVb9IGkEH9oyDw5KkH0Dm_sYBtKvFDpkkTtOhfW-_XVROdIxD-g0BHP7R0W2e25NGbT96vPqVi1YNJy1iU-ur8yfZShaDev1daUFl3LllTibOHYAvq1GeT3ZcvVbwlPe9IqiBeM3Yp8XK0SXLjL_S9UrI5P_mjPikQLDO2CAuRNHut5XI0ygRWs60-KYgvAYLCpeUt3BSjX42AfVE6AztP6nvV2hkpx-POUS_alYTV4IopcuG7cte1F64SwUH1cJwyc3dcFAyL-zNNgsLT5I28yP1)**_

It's worse than incompetence. President Biden purposefully canceled the completion of President Trump's effective border wall and ended the successful "Remain in Mexico" policy that required asylum-seekers to apply and wait for legal status in Mexico or their home country.

**Therefore, we must put even more pressure on President Biden and the Democrats in Congress to enforce our laws and defend our border.**

Until we can defeat the disastrous Biden-Harris duo in the next presidential race, _we must continue to resist their open borders madness in Congress._

Instead of thanking our brave Border Patrol agents for doing their dangerous job, President Biden and the Democrats attack them! | Fellow American, The disaster at our southern border is appalling. Recently, I sent out this tweet: Apparently, President Biden's "Border Czar," VP Kamala Harris, is more concerned about the immigrants illegally attempting to enter our country than our overworked and underappreciated American Border Patrol agents. While Harris is "deeply troubled" about Border Patrol agents on horseback who are trying to prevent immigrants from illegally entering our country, like most Americans, I am deeply troubled by the fact that we have thousands of immigrants rushing our border daily (with an estimated 50,000 more en route) , taxing the system, and making life hell on Earth for the Border Patrol and the people of the Rio Grande Valley. Fellow American, on multiple occasions , I have called for Senate hearings about what is going on at our southern border, but unfortunately, we can't get Democrats to hold such important hearings. | Whether they're in the White House or here on Capitol Hill, Democrats continue to turn a blind eye to - or actively encourage - the endless stream of illegals, not just from Mexico and Central America, but the Caribbean, Africa, and even the Middle East. Fellow American, that's why I am counting on folks like you to send a strong message to Democrats in Washington - It's worse than incompetence. President Biden purposefully canceled the completion of President Trump's effective border wall and ended the successful "Remain in Mexico" policy that required asylum-seekers to apply and wait for legal status in Mexico or their home country. Therefore, we must put even more pressure on President Biden and the Democrats in Congress to enforce our laws and defend our border. Until we can defeat the disastrous Biden-Harris duo in the next presidential race, we must continue to resist their open borders madness in Congress. I know that together, we can make a change. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham United States Senator | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

name: time-sensitive survey (via Nick Freitas)
subject: Biden’s latest atrocity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:

Virginia played a crucial role in firing Donald Trump in 2020, but make no mistake -- Glenn Youngkin is doing everything he can to bring Trumpism back.
He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend **$75 million of his own cash to buy the Governor’s office.**

ICYMI: Covid-19 Deaths in 2021 Surpass Entirety of 2020
“As of Wednesday, U.S. localities have reported 353,000 deaths since January 1, according to data compiled by Johns Hopkins University.

That surpasses the 352,000 deaths reported in 2020 in the 10 months following the first recorded domestic outbreaks of the disease in March...” — Forbes, Oct. 6, 2021

Donald J. Trump October 7th, 2021
Fiona Hill was terrible at her job. The first time I remember hearing her name was during Impeachment Hoax # 1, where she worked hard to say anything bad, but there wasn’t much. It was a total con job. She may have been in the Oval and conference rooms with me, but this was not anybody who I recognized. Then she acted like she was a know-it-all, but in reality, she had no influence whatsoever.

She was very close to one of the dumbest and most “crazed” people in Washington, John Bolton. Both of them didn’t say much and what they did say wasn’t listened to, especially after Bolton’s statement that he wants the “Libya Model” on North Korea in the midst of my negotiation with Kim Jong Un. He made that statement on “Deface the Nation”, or “Meet the Fake Press”—it doesn’t matter, they’re all the same. Fortunately, Kim Jong Un understood how stupid he was, and wouldn’t allow him at meetings or dinners (I liked that).

Fiona Hill was a Deep State stiff with a nice accent. Books are being written by people like her who had virtually no access to me, and who I didn’t even know. They write it as if they’re experts on “Trump,” but they know absolutely nothing about me. My function was to save our Country and Survive. Unfortunately, when you look at what is happening now with Afghanistan, the Border, inflation, etc., our Country is not being saved. It is in big trouble!

Donald J. Trump October 7th, 2021
Save America Announces Pre-Program Speakers for Iowa Rally
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by Governor Kim Reynolds, Senator Chuck Grassley, Republican Party of Iowa Chairman Jeff Kaufmann, Former Acting Attorney General Matt Whitaker, Representative Ashley Hinson, Representative Mariannette Miller-Meeks and Iowa Secretary Mike Naig, at the Save America Rally in Des Moines, Iowa on Saturday, October 9, 2021.

This rally is a continuation of President Trump’s many appearances in support of candidates and causes that further the MAGA legacy and accomplishments of President Trump’s Administration.

Trump October 7th, 2021 ICYMI: Covid-19 Deaths in 2021 Surpass Entirety of 2020 “As of Wednesday, U.S. localities have reported 353,000 deaths since January 1, according to data compiled by Johns Hopkins University. That surpasses the 352,000 deaths reported in 2020 in the 10 months following the first recorded domestic outbreaks of the disease in March...” — Forbes, Oct. 6, 2021 | ---|--- Donald J. Trump October 7th, 2021 Fiona Hill was terrible at her job. The first time I remember hearing her name was during Impeachment Hoax # 1, where she worked hard to say anything bad, but there wasn’t much. It was a total con job. She may have been in the Oval and conference rooms with me, but this was not anybody who I recognized. Then she acted like she was a know-it-all, but in reality, she had no influence whatsoever. She was very close to one of the dumbest and most “crazed” people in Washington, John Bolton. Both of them didn’t say much and what they did say wasn’t listened to, especially after Bolton’s statement that he wants the “Libya Model” on North Korea in the midst of my negotiation with Kim Jong Un. He made that statement on “Deface the Nation”, or “Meet the Fake Press”—it doesn’t matter, they’re all the same. Fortunately, Kim Jong Un understood how stupid he was, and wouldn’t allow him at meetings or dinners (I liked that). Fiona Hill was a Deep State stiff with a nice accent. Books are being written by people like her who had virtually no access to me, and who I didn’t even know. They write it as if they’re experts on “Trump,” but they know absolutely nothing about me. My function was to save our Country and Survive. Unfortunately, when you look at what is happening now with Afghanistan, the Border, inflation, etc., our Country is not being saved. It is in big trouble! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump October 7th, 2021 ICYMI: Tweet by Steve Scalise Thank you to Steve Scalise and Family. Fake News never ends! | ---|--- Donald J. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Re: The most vulnerable Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=445b98dedafc478495f91f87ec6b5b0c&_e=64oq57rHuaxvXtDRaZXa1djTsSIZ7u5enQ0IXQg2xnFvtMxgViRrDn22YhfRyBHQTWs2prsm-zDXB8g2NQIiGAI3UbP9CILyRoO73_cTd8T_V8Ub1sJ430MWR-zatEuhKVs-C6ko1gUYsFFsgrhXQYn8hCUXXClhhHVQN-Vh9Q2VA2gnKKlWv84e83AA4ldfwlLscYnAn7C8UNbHqQGgXDnM7PGsQ9GvIt4Ej5Y745QijTTO8xJTw_Fz84xVBtYBDPemwZXVteuiHcW60TnCgJsBP7mDcdvkQtdNQlu_ikLSoWn5vgjVdCKOtQLmhUAp7RocgWufdt1opGdnXEkoptl3kW7mIXV28d4cH6wluyUyukZcnUVL-bc0JEzTgP0pGSKl7Gjfc_uXol8bNSk7UXHw9wec0F9LQKWA9xn8O7u4jr73Ah4jAOPOUP5VfR6qgtIHRnEAYCRQife42kRv3w%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

body:
Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t |

**"NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT"**

Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for.

Both are false.

Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany.

**[Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=824f224ced294433ba8c7428bd5ddfab&_e=DN8OhHJ8pcIj61Cs67GFTWwZgv-zeWCvbYr9rFfjDzWRZw6c6L0-tEWYcrjhlNALwd_5A4Zs6pzrUqw89ixAAcaiX7gID8mDLh_DGWRTqBlebdMaTPnTGCNfGLDKgINFqwSWG2549JQYNlNJYu-Qe8uU_IN3Fv94aiGneuApeJA_dZlecbCilqw6E-z5Mjuh0tbT0NaWj4pxWDW6fdac0BsOgZsbSKNK6UbkYjyfNv7PEfR7TqnzclgPrsNNPbGuUCWn7A8XY5dA0BH5C5tePYs-oMuRLvUH9pFTmWH-E_K8H0zE4SfdAIKLWiu6Xmljkxh7vHwQUrxEDBFbwE89PZg3_ry-3FoB7N6wxsUWh5XGpsylFhq9yKOo5LxuhvTUW10-1uAw4HN_WTjLtMjQCFasqSULnK4aSs7P2oJ20nrOdj-c6psyQQRN3CiK_YBGbPC07XlL9neZ5oTzqHGm7GZ0vgoWXVjRV-N6LUDmS9k%3D)**
* Germany: 49%
* Sweden: 43%
* France: 47%

Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state?

[** LET US KNOW TODAY->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=824f224ced294433ba8c7428bd5ddfab&_e=DN8OhHJ8pcIj61Cs67GFTWwZgv-zeWCvbYr9rFfjDzWRZw6c6L0-tEWYcrjhlNALwd_5A4Zs6pzrUqw89ixAAcaiX7gID8mDLh_DGWRTqBlebdMaTPnTGCNfGLDKgINFqwSWG2549JQYNlNJYu-Qe8uU_IN3Fv94aiGneuApeJA_dZlecbCilqw6E-z5Mjuh0tbT0NaWj4pxWDW6fdac0BsOgZsbSKNK6UbkYjyfNv7PEfR7TqnzclgPrsNNPbGuUCWn7A8XY5dA0BH5C5tePYhhIsvu2REdZag6H8wqPzMy9wRLjFRHa34zRK2F9-1f48TdTdTS1-9Q_AGmjwu5y9_kEEdUNXoG7a2IAfIvVNhqCuLEIhqaPjp-HY-t-uibL82WKkLXcbmCmNG5dimvmEbYqas5PF2YGuz1OI732u6I3tpIikb41tZcUNC5vVnm5PePGQRp6zQB2cBZ7K2v4os4QMI_9YL-i4l2EjGam20%3D)
Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America?

Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline.

**[We want to know where you stand. clean_body: Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined t | "NEW TAXES ONLY BECOME INEVITABLE WHEN A DEMOCRAT IS ELECTED PRESIDENT" Democrats want the American people to believe their “Build Back Better” initiatives are not only good for American society, but also fully paid for. Both are false. Senate Republicans can all agree that imposing new taxes on Americans is not the way to keep our economy healthy. Yet Democrats seem more determined than ever in emulating European welfare states like Norway, Sweden and even Germany. Germany: 49% Sweden: 43% France: 47% Do you support increased taxes to fund Biden’s welfare state? Before the coronavirus pandemic, the United States economy under President Trump was humming along – growing at rates Europe could only dream about. Think about it, when was the last time high-tax countries were known for anything other than having high taxes? Is that what we want in America? Raising taxes on private corporations and working Americans will stifle innovation and lead to our nation’s decline. ** Thanks, NRSC HQ If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: (1) SIGNATURE PENDING (via DCCC)
subject: do you stand with President Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you CONDEMN Republicans at the polls for playing reckless political games when they should be delivering for the American people?
| | | [Let us know: Do you AGREE that Republicans who prioritize reckless political games over real governing should be voted out of office? >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

**Republicans are back to their old games.**

_They 're putting up roadblocks to our progress at every turn.

They're attempting to derail our efforts to hold Trump and his cronies accountable.

And now they're even playing dangerous political games with our national economy._

**It 's outrageous -- and potentially catastrophic.**

And to these obstructionist Republicans, President Biden has just one thing to say:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-9_r~)

We couldn't agree more.

There's too much on the line to let Republicans and their political games blow our Democrats -- and our nation -- off course.

But we need to know we have your steadfast support if we're going to defeat these reckless Republicans in the midterm elections.

**So let us know: Will you CONDEMN Republicans for playing political games when they should be delivering for the American people?
**
---
[STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN: Do you AGREE that we need to get Republicans out of the way? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45745066&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMDc1MzA1OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45745066&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMDc1MzA1OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
